reviews.text:
Mark and his team were absolutely incredible to work with. With decades of experience handling complex financial situations, Mark guided me through one of the most challenging times of my life with skill and compassion.

After a car accident forced me to close my business and lose my income, I reached out to many attorneys before choosing Mark. I’m highly selective, I delivered excellence in my own business, so I have a keen eye for it in others. From the start, Mark and his team stood out. They treated me with kindness, respect, and patience, making a difficult process feel smooth and manageable.

I have a brain injury from the accident, which makes it hard for me to process complex information. Mark and his team went above and beyond to simplify everything, ensuring I fully understood each step, without becoming overwhelmed. Their professionalism, empathy, and expertise exceeded my expectations. If you need a bankruptcy attorney, look no further, Mark and his team are the absolute best. I can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.text: My husband and I wanted to post a review for Mark McClure law. We reached out to many other Law  firms and were surprised at the hasty manner of how our call was processed. Our consultation with Mark McClure was equally professional, and he provided us with exceptional information and guidance for the predicament we are facing. Based on our experience we would recommend Mark McClure Law.

Hello all,
Below is my personal review for the Law office of Mr. Mark McClure.
In my personal opinion, I think Mark McClure and his office staff are one of the most professional law offices around. If you are looking for a bankruptcy attorney to help you with your issues then Honestly, stop right here and call his office. They made the process for us comfortable, smooth and Very reassuring, once I contacted them NO creditors called us to bother us and that is one of the things most people are looking to stop- the annoying phone calls from creditors or collection agencies! His staff, (Kim & Averie) were wonderful and helped us throughout every step of the way all the way to the completion of our case. Call his office and let them assist you with your case. You cannot be in better legal hands.
James...
Thank you for making my bankruptcy so easy and affordable, it was wonderful working with you.

reviews.text: Brad is a true professional. Ethical, knowledgeable and a decent person whom I felt looked out for my best interests throughout the (16) mos ordeal. A grey divorce is not easy and I felt my interests and concerns were promptly and expertly addressed. Highly recommend Brad for complicated cases.
I found Brad in the phone book. No one referred or recommended him to me. I liked his name and he was not too far away. Best choice I ever made. Two thumbs up and a 5 Star rating.

Simply put, Brad is incredible and I strongly recommend for any person going through a divorce. First and foremost, his compassion and empathy is genuine. During the toughest moment of my life, I felt he was truly understanding and on my side as a human - not just a legal rep. This came through in nearly every conversation we had from start to finish. Secondly, while Brad is very much empathetic, he is an incredibly sharp legal mind and will provide guidance to help put you in the very best position, even if it's guidance you don't want to hear. In my case, he was playing chess, while my emotions had me playing checkers. I could not have achieved a better outcome despite many odds likely stacked against me. In fact, I came out significantly better than expected and I credit Brad's patience, understanding of my case, and his legal & personal guidance. Lastly, I'll address cost since that is what was originally on my mind, and likely on many others. Brad's rates are extremely reasonable, however he doesn't seek frequent contact to randomly charge clients (in this case, me). Every interaction is truly intended to be value add and he maximizes every penny spent. Brad is an incredible family law lawyer and after this case, I'd say a first class man. I was honored to have him represent me and I hope anyone who goes through this unfortunate situation in life, immediately seeks out Brad.
Brad has helped me with a few family law matters over the past 12 years. He is great at what he does. He’s consistently provided great advice a calm demeanor. I highly recommend him!

I interviewed three other attorneys before selecting Brad Crosta for representation. My reason for choosing Brad was his very straightforward, no nonsense approach. I appreciated his ability to maintain a sense of pragmatism and see things clearly without getting bogged down in the, what I can only call 'craziness' of parts of the case.  My case involved a petitioner with serious mental health issues, and Brad was able to navigate the complexity of managing the frustrating and irrational aspects of the process in a way that kept me feeling safe, well represented and understood. I ultimately went to trial, and was awarded my requests from the judge. I owe this in no small part to Brad and will always be deeply grateful for his thorough, thoughtful, and expert representation.

I want to specifically thank Ayat Khan at Khan Law Firm for her outstanding professionalism and honesty. She was incredibly helpful from the start. Ayat provided clear, understandable answers to all of my questions and never hesitated to give me the information I needed.

What truly stood out was her integrity. While I was considering other law firms, Ayat’s straightforward and honest approach is what ultimately convinced me to choose Khan Law. She focused on giving me the facts I needed to make the right decision, rather than just making a sale.

Thank you, Ayat, for your exceptional service and for guiding me through this process with such clarity and care.

I seriously cannot say enough good things about my lawyer Jendra !!!!!  The way she handled my daughter’s and my case after we were involved in a hit and run accident . From the very first conversation, she showed true genuine compassion, patience, and professionalism during what was one of the most overwhelming times of both of our lives .
Not only that , she was incredibly thorough and knowledgeable, taking the time to explain every step of the process so we always understood what was happening and what to expect next. She did no waver ,  even when my own insurance started slacking , she was on it !! She consistently checked in, answered all of my million questions without making me feel embarrassed or rushed, and made sure both my daughter’s well-being and my own were truly prioritized—not just the case itself.
What stood out most was her dedication and advocacy !!! She handled all communication with my insurance company and fought to ensure we were treated fairly, and never made us feel like just another case . Her attention to detail, integrity, and calm confidence gave me the peace of mind when I needed it most .
Thanks to her hard work and commitment, we were able to focus on healing while knowing our case was in the best possible hands. I highly recommend this law firm to anyone looking for an attorney who is not only highly skilled, but genuinely cares about the people she represents.

Both Ayat Khan and Shoaib Chowdhury were excellent. They were very responsive to my emails, questions, and followed up quickly with phone calls for updates especially Shoaib! I highly recommend them.

reviews.text:
My siblings were involved in a serious car accident that left us overwhelmed and uncertain about the next steps, I turned to Khan Law Firm for help, and it was one of the best decisions We,ve ever made. From my initial consultation to the final settlement, the team—led by Khalil Khan and Jendra Dudley—handled everything with the utmost professionalism, empathy, and efficiency, transforming a potentially chaotic situation into a manageable and positive experience. Right from the start, their proactive communication set them apart; they kept me updated on every development without me having to chase for information, which greatly reduced my stress during a difficult time. Jendra's meticulous attention to detail was evident in how she reviewed medical records, insurance claims, and accident reports, ensuring nothing was missed that could impact my case. Meanwhile, Khalil and Jendra strategic approach and negotiation skills shone through in securing an excellent settlement that far exceeded my expectations, all while demonstrating unwavering integrity and reliability—I always felt like my best interests were their top priority. What impressed me most was their dependability and hard work; they followed up diligently on every lead, coordinated seamlessly with medical providers and insurance companies, and were always available to answer my questions, no matter how small. The entire firm operates with a level of attentiveness that's rare in the legal field, treating clients like family rather than just another case. Their commitment to excellence didn't stop at the settlement—they even provided guidance on post-accident recovery resources, showing a holistic care that went above and beyond.

I'm incredibly thankful for the outstanding outcome they delivered, and I have no hesitation in giving Khan Law Firm a resounding 5-star rating. If you're dealing with a car accident or any personal injury matter, do yourself a favor and contact them; Khalil, Jendra, and the team are truly the best in the business, and they'll fight for you with the dedication you deserve!

This would be the best decision you would ever make. Guaranteed.

reviews.text: I have known and worked with Doug on and off for over twenty years now. He has the biggest compassionate heart ever and he uses that to fuel his fight for his clients to make sure they are compensated to the best of his ability for their injuries. I refer all of my family, friends and associates to Doug for their injury and legal needs.

Doug and Inga took one of the most stressful (car accident) events in my life and made it as stressless as they could. Doug was able to deal with all the insurance companies involved including my healthcare insurance so that I can heal and continue with my daily life. He was able to negotiate a settlement that covered all my medical bills and allow me to continue the therapy I still need. I recommend Doug to anyone who is in a minor or major accident. He knows his stuff and is a professional and honest lawyer.

Friendly, candid and thorough consult. I'll be referring you to my friends and family. Thank you so much for giving me more insight into the options available to me!!! I also really appreciated that you took my finances into account and gave me names of people I could talk to.

I've known Doug for over 2 years now.  I had no idea of his occupation as he made no mention of it.  Nearly 2 months after the incident, my lower back and leg began to worsen and I knew it was because of the incident.  Being a typical man, I had just tried to tough it out.  I just happened to be speaking to a mutual friend who he informed me that Doug is an Attorney specializing in these matters.  He recommended that I contact Doug.  I was initially hesitant to do so because I thought there was nothing that could be done since I did not seek immediate medical attention.  Facing out of pocket medical bills I decided to call Doug.  Fast forward a few months and I can happily say my matter was resolved with no cost to me.  My medical bills were taken care of and I got the result I had hoped for.  Doug and his paralegal, Inga, were prompt, professional and understanding throughout the entire process.  Without any reservations, I wholeheartedly recommend Doug!

Doug represented me after I was hit by an automobile driver while on my bike. First and foremost, Doug obtained a fair settlement for my injuries. He was prepared to take my case to trial, which I believe ultimately helped me receive a legitimate settlement offer from the driver's insurance company. Almost as important, he kept me informed by taking the time to clearly explain my options at each step of the legal process in language I could understand. I will strongly recommend Doug to family and friends if they are ever hurt and need a lawyer.
Hired Douglas for legal advice. Fast response time and clear, precise information. Can't go wrong here.

I really hate to have to write this review but I feel that I must warn others, especially men, about the substandard work of Mr. Kontos.  I wish I had read all the reviews of him before hiring him.  Yes, he has been practicing for quite a long time but has, ostensibly, only focused on family law for 10 years or so.  My situation wasn't great and I knew I would have to pay my ex, as she never worked during the marriage, but nothing near the amount what was ultimately awarded.  In the end I would up losing out on about $500,000! I own my own business and make, after taxes and expenses, approximately $100,000 per year.  At arbitration, I was ordered to pay spousal and child support to my ex for the next 3 years in the approximate amount of $60,000 per year (after her having received $300,000 in assets) and if you do the math, I walk with $40,000 per year.

The main issue is, he just didn't try and even when things got difficult, not because of me, but because of the situation of her never having worked, he basically told me to go it alone and he would withdraw! I mean, I was at a loss as I had hired him to help me.

The mediation was a disaster, the mediator believed everything my ex and her attorney said with very little pushback from David. The parenting plan looked like an English paper with 90% corrections crossed out in ink by the teacher and then that was all jumbled together with remaining errors and omissions.  That was just regarding the parenting plan and now I am an every other weekend dad.

The arbitration was worse, it had to have been the worst arbitration decision the arbitrator ever issued, just given the explanation of the written decision.  The arbitrator referred to David's presentation with phrases such as "given the dearth of information" and "given the extraordinary paucity of the information provided by Petitioner (David being my attorney) both in the form of documentation and written presentation under oath, has in some respects relegated the Arbitrator to consider historical, and hence, theoretical application." Additionally, the arbitrator stated, it wasn't his intention to put down, criticize or belittle the presentation but provided how poor it was, he was given no choice but to give my ex about $500,000 (including future support, 75% of the home proceeds, I was to pay ALL debt we acquired during the marriage and pay ALL of her attorney fees).  The decision was entirely based upon his failure to provide necessary documentation for the arbitrator's review such as: amount of loan on my vehicle, profit and loss of my business, my credit card debts, my business debts on a monthly basis.  I had provided all of these to David and he just plain failed to include them in the arbitration materials or in the actual arbitration presentation orally. I don't know if it was laziness or ineptitude.

All of these failures resulted in my having to file for bankruptcy after the arbitration decision.  My ex was essentially awarded what a professional athlete's ex would have been given, and in many instances more!

I simply cannot recommend David, he talks an initial good game but is lackluster in his presentation and frankly just didn't seem to fight or care.  I would avoid using him for any family law matter.
Collects money, doesn’t listen to client. Nor does he produce results. Personally produced   all court ordained docs.
Thankful for all the support that was given to me during the hard process of a divorce. I highly recommend David and his team!

I am not sure how he has over a 4 star review. He started my case out well, staff was great. But when it came to court, he absolutely lost it!! Would not listen to me, got ran over and backed up on. He lost my case to a drug addicted, DUI, jailbird with zero legal help. I should have stood up and fired him in court and asked for a continuation. But I couldn’t, because he used them all up!!!
If your loved ones mean something to you, I would advise you, in my opinion, go someplace else!

I did not get to hire Mr. Kontos, however speaking with him & receiving him as a referral source & subsequent referrals from him I could assess him to be a kind and professional attorney in family law. He was direct and straightforward and had my best interest even though we had not entered into a client/attorney relationship. The reviews pertaining to his skills as a calm communicator are accurate. I wish he practiced in Pierce as I would have hired him for my needs.
I called and left 2 voicemails and I still haven't received a call back... I don't intend to pursue them for legal assistance.

If you don't have alot of experience dealing with lawyers, want a lawyer who, is very knowledgeable in alot of areas, especially family law, with ease in communication to get the right results for your situation, and whether you need to hire them, need help  with  pro se advice or assistance, the lawyers, David Kontos and Cameron Pearson are the " Right kind of lawyers"!
Never consulted. My review regards the person answering your phone. Try and seem a little polite with prospective clients, and by the way your listed on google as free consultation, not $100.00
Friends speak highly of service!
I don’t have any words for the service I received from David and staff more like extended family will recommend to everyone
Very happy with my choice for family law.

David Kontos was my mediator for my divorce. After years of disagreement with the other party AKA Medusa, David was able to find a way for us to maintain a shared custody of our chikdren. I would recommend David to anyone seeking a mediator. He and his staff are very professional and organized.

I have sent a number of people over to David in the last few years.  David has always taken the time to answer their questions.  He has a vast legal knowledge and is very compassionate and understanding.  I would highly recommend David Kontos
Best Family Law attorney hands down.

Perfect! Exactly what I needed. He was competitively priced and when my ex-wife tried to take my kids out of state he helped me through getting a restraining order dropped and the judge sided with me on 5 out of 6 counts. What was particularly surprising was Mr. Kontos knowledge and experience. In my first appointment he told me what the court was likely to do. In the end it was exactly as he said. I cannot recommend him more!

Terrible, terrible, terrible! Hired him for a child support case and dont think he did anything other than file the papers. Didnt inform us of the papers we needed to provide for our case until it was too late to submit them. I could have done a better job on my own. Do yourself a favor and find a different attorney that will actually help you in your case.
As a fellow attorney I have known David for several years.  I have the highest regard for his abilities as a family law lawyer.  I would not hesitate to recommend him.

Although I was not the one who hired this firm, they were directly involved in handling a legal transaction in which I was a named party. They prepared and processed documents I signed, communicated directly with me, and gave assurances that everything — including financial releases — would be handled after my signing.

Despite this, the firm failed to file critical paperwork for months, misspelled names in legal documents, and left me tied to financial liabilities I was told would be removed. These failures created major personal and financial stress.

This goes far beyond clerical mistakes. It reflects either gross negligence or indifference to the responsibilities they undertook. Whether I was the paying client or not, I was materially affected by their failure to act with care. Others should think twice before trusting them to handle serious legal matters.
Jeff Floyd is an attorney with years of experience in both personal injury and family law practices. He combines a wealth of experience with a caring personality. I highly recommend him.
He is very knowledgeable and pleasant to work with! His team follows up very well! I am so blessed to find him for my car accident claim!

Jeff is an AMAZING attorney. He is great at actively listening to the problems I was facing and helped guide me through what to expect throughout the entire process. His calm demeanor helped tremendously with my anxiety of getting through my case. Thanks Jeff!
Great lawyers. Very reliable.We could not have won without their help.Highly recommended
Jeff and his team are amazing! If you are looking for a team of well experienced and caring lawyer to handle your case, I will highly recommend Jeff Floyd and his team. You won't regret it!

Jeff has been helping me and  my clients since the 1990's and he has always been responsive, knowledgeable and honest.  From fender benders to divorces to major liability cases I have seen him help people with compassion and caring with great success.

I've worked with Jeff and his team on several injury claims and they are very good at representing their clients, getting their bills paid and getting them a fair settlement. If you've been in a crash, talk to this man. In my experience, most insurers are more concerned with their bottom line than the health and wellbeing of their customers. Mr. Floyd will make sure they honor whatever contract you have with them. I can't say enough good things about this Jeffrey S. Floyd and associates.

During what might be the most stressful time of your life, why not consult with someone that has years of experience? Lean on Jeff Floyd and team to help you navigate your situation and give you peace of mind. He is sincere and knowledgeable and quite easy to talk to.
If you are looking for a great attorney to represent you, I highly recommend Jeffrey Floyd.

I have been in a networking group with Jeff Floyd for 7 months. Jeff is a great person, with an excellent work ethic. His knowledge of the law and its application is exceptional. Jeff went to a great school and has decades of experience.

If you are looking for a great attorney to represent you in your divorce or child custody case, look no further! I trusted Jeff to handle my situation and I was extremely pleased. I truly felt that he was genuine in his desire to help me, I wasn't just a $ sign to him. He was very supportive and even after the case ended he checked up on me to make sure all was well, even helped me with offering job leads. That is going above and beyond! Thanks Jeff.

Jeff Floyd and his team, especially Evan, are very high quality, compassionate attorneys that care for their clients and always do what is right. They are very trustworthy and very knowledgeable. I worked with Jeff and Evan on a catastrophic injury truck wreck case. I was impressed with his legal knowledge and willingness to work hard against a large corporation and the insurance companies. No matter your legal issue, you will be in good hands here, Jeff is one of the best lawyers in Washington.
Jeffrey helped me win my child custody case!

Jeff prepared the most fabulous final documents for my father before he died.  They were so great that another attorney in Langley, Washington, on Whidbey Island copied them and kept them for his clients.

If you’re an injured worker in Washington State and feel like the system is against you, this is the person you want standing beside you. L&I claim managers don't return calls. Doctor's office is tired of you calling because they can't get the authorization for you and they have better things to do. You don't know if L&I will be sending your next check or if they'll send you to an IME to close your claim. It's so messy and stressful. Tara and her staff have seen it all before. They don't just handle paperwork. They fight for medical care, payments, employment and every benefit.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Erika! This means a lot to us!

reviews.text:
Run far away from these lawyers!! They will treat you with absolute disrespect, will do nothing for your case, then blame you for it. Then to add icing on the cake, AFTER they drop you they will then stalk your social media profiles

I'd post the screenshots here if I could!

Dropped February 19th, viewed my LinkedIn February 26th! That is straight out creepy!! Do yourself a MASSIVE favor and find someone else.

And before she tries to do crowd control like she always does, my wife did have consent EVEN THOUGH I tried to tell you multiple times while you talked over me, you were so loud I genuinely tried to slip that in because my wife could hear you involuntary.

You clearly have the same problem over and over because the same issues I had with you is stated in multiple reviews.

You also clearly aren't paying attention to what your employees are doing because you have plenty of time to watch and respond to poor reviews!

I can’t recommend this workers’ compensation attorney enough. From the very beginning, they made what felt like an overwhelming and stressful situation so much easier to navigate. They took the time to explain every step of the process, answered all of my questions quickly, and made sure I felt supported the entire time.

reviews.text:
Edit: well, with how loud you were yelling at my husband over the phone it wasn’t that hard to overhear you guys and no, you do not deserve the apology. You did nothing for his claim you damaged it. Say all you want about me damaging your reputation but the way you treated my husband was sickening. That is not how a lawyer treats people you were so disrespectful. I could hear you yelling at him over the phone. And once again, what lawyer uses the word salty in a conversation are you in high school grow up and act like the adult you’re supposed to be. reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for posting this same review everywhere on the internet (Google, Yelp, FindLaw, etc). We strive to help clients in need that are willing to follow our advice. That's what people hire us for. We are unable to help people who are not willing to follow our recommendations. When communication becomes unproductive or expectations are misaligned with legal realities, we sometimes have to withdraw as appropriate under applicable ethical rules. In addition, we maintain a firm commitment to ensuring that our attorneys and staff are always treated with courtesy and respect. When interactions fall short of that standard, we take appropriate steps to protect the integrity of our team and our practice. We wish you best of luck with your claim and future endeavors.

reviews.text:
This is a true firm that is sincere about helping people.
We were dealing with a debt collector about an alleged debt we could find no record of. Before finding Anderson Santiago PLLC we had already been to court twice and managed to avoid being ruled against because our case was not as cut and dry as the debt collection was making it sound. We just didn’t know how to fight back. We tried to negotiate with the other law firm but they felt no need to make any fair compromise as they felt they had a strong case against us. I was stressing because our next court date was less than a month away and we felt our backs were against the wall. I found an Online ad for Santiago around midnight as I was up late trying to find a defense that would get the debt collector off our back.  This was causing me and my wife constant stress. Tyler contacted me within 24 hours of filling out their online form. Laid out our options and then went to work on the solution. Within 72 hours he had gotten the court date cancelled and brought the other law firm to the negotiating table.
He then worked with us on a number that was more than fair on his fee. About a week later we got a letter from the other law firm with a settlement number that they had agreed upon and it was pennies on the dollar. Tyler is definitely a force to be reckoned with when dealing with collection agencies.
My advice is if you are dealing with a debt collector. Call these guys. Be honest with them and if there is a solution they know what it is.
I wish I had found them before we ever went to court but better late than never.
reviews.ownerResponse: Tyler is as good as there is. Thank you for the kind words!

reviews.text: I went to this firm hoping for support and guidance to improve my financial situation as someone receiving zero income and unable to work due to multiple disabilities. Instead, they only added financial and emotional stress, making my situation worse. My disabilities made it impossible for me to navigate the process or complete applications on my own, so I trusted them to provide the help I desperately needed. Over two years, they’ve accomplished nothing, yet I now I still owe nearly $600—for "benefit planning" which is essentially time they charged to respond to my family and I asking for updates just to communicate that they had done nothing. It put me in a position where I feel I can't even contact them about disputing their charges because they charge $5.42/minute. I eventually had to hire new counsel, effectively losing two crucial years in the lengthy process of securing disability benefits. This delay put my family and loved ones under significant financial stress and to take on debt, as they were forced to support me financially during this time. Their practices feel predatory and exploitative, especially toward people in vulnerable situations who rely on their expertise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Beam – we are very sorry to hear you are unhappy with the services we provided. We strive to work with clients to get the benefits they are entitled to, but it appears that you were not able to furnish us with the needed information to continue the application process for you and to finalize the documents that we prepared for you. We also have written communications that you and your family wished to do the benefit work independently, without our assistance. It sounds like you found another firm and we hope they were able to help you. We would be happy to address your concerns regarding the overdue bill and assist you further if needed. Please contact our office and ask for our bookkeeper to discuss the balance due. We do not bill for any time spent addressing billing issues with clients.
Thank you Leslie, we look forward to working with you!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Maria,

We are sorry you feel this way about our service and the outcome you received. There are several reasons why a case may take some time to resolve, including yours. Insurance companies (and eventually courts) require complete records to evaluate a claim, and missing documents can significantly reduce the value of your case or delay payment later. And, due to your complex injuries, if we resolve your case too early, we risk undervaluing it. We needed a complete picture of your injuries, future care needs, and permanent effects to demand full compensation. And, unfortunately, delay is a standard insurance strategy. They know financial pressure increases the chance of a lower settlement, and we don’t want you settling for less than you deserve.

Ultimately, we were able to obtain the at-fault driver's full policy limits for you. We understand that you were not happy with the portion of compensation paid directly to you. But, you failed to protect yourself by not having any insurance, and (to your chagrin) your medical providers deserved to be paid something for treating your injuries.

We understand that you believe that you "would have gotten more in less time." The fact that you fail to understand these concepts -- including having your own insurance in place such as PIP/UIM to protect yourself when the other driver has insufficient insurance coverage -- strongly suggests to us that your belief is inaccurate. Opinions . . . well, everyone has one.

We wish you well.

reviews.text: Waiting alone at Valley General for the taxi to take me home after the accident that totaled my car began the grueling recovery. From the first call, it was right. Victor and his awesome capable paralegal Angila, walked with me every step of the way. I did my best to cooperate in every request and instruction but I was not the best client, I couldn’t keep a diary of daily challenges and I knew I was giving them a dog case with my age and life challenges. TORRES & HAROLDSON always encouraged, they kept me informed every step. Three years later I was not well enough for settlement; trial was scheduled for Jan 2020. My TORRES & HAROLDSON advocates never abandoned me. Their primary instruction was to let them take the legal and I was to concentrate on rest and healing. In December 2019, Victor called and asked what were my expectations for a reasonable settlement. I truthfully told him I would consider myself fortunate to come out with medical paid and something toward paying off the car I had to buy, and hopefully a sum to help with continued therapy. He said he has xxx dollars he knew he could get for me; would this be acceptable? I nearly fell off my chair. TORRES & HAROLDSON advocates turned my dog case into a miracle outcome. I would not have to work to age 70 and, NO TRIAL. Benefit of wisdom can be yours too choosing TORRES & HAROLDSON. If you are not convinced, reread the reviews then, CALL TORRES & HAROLDSON. You will never be in this alone. Your advocates are just that one phone call away, CALL. God bless you and our advocates TORRES & HAROLDSON.

Really glad I went with Philip Petersen. He's really responsive, non-judgemental, and easy to work with. In no time, he turned a stressful situation into the past. I have recommended him to several people and will continue to!

Puget law group is Excellent! I'm a first time offender And they did a great job of walking me through the process.  Which was very helpful. They are honest and knowledgeable and In my case I got it dropped down to aggressive driving! No DUI on my record! Thank you Puget Law Group!

The Puget law group are all kind and intelligent people, but for me personally my hero to save the day was Phil su. This guy goes above and beyond. He’s informative with out making you feel less than (as I’m sure we’ve all had lawyers do). He’s my go-to guy for any legal questions or binds I find myself in. Worth the money, make the call.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Tracy! Phil is pretty great!

reviews.text: Phillip Peterson is a great lawyer who went above and beyond in my case to do anything he could to reassure everything is alright! Rest assured, everything was fine! He is a fantastic attorney who I couldn't recommend enough
Phil Su has helped me multiple times, very thankful for him. the best lawyer I have ever had. God bless you Phil.

Puget Law Group, specifically Philip Petersen did an amazing job helping me get my life back in order after a devastating personal event that had me in a downward spiral. Mr Peterson was attentive and supportive.  When my tendency was to lean toward rash decisions due to the impact that this event had on me, Mr Peterson was there to keep me on center. He offered good, sound advice and was able to recommend a course of action that provided results better than I thought possible.
Thank you again Philip!

Couldn’t be happier with the representation I received from Phillip Peterson he was very up front and honest about my chances with my case and kept me well informed on everything that was going on. Me and my family couldn’t be happier with the outcome he achieved either!

I've had the pleasure of having Philip Petersen represent me several times now.  Always a favorable outcome.  I've referred several coworkers as well and they were also extremely pleased with their experiences and outcomes.  Highly recommend.

I've used Phil Petersen for two cases now and he's never disappointed. Extremely knowledgeable, professional, well connected and goes over and beyond! He even answered my phone calls at any time of the day and got back to me fast as possible if I happed to get his voice mail. Absolutely amazing work!
Phil was great. Very responsive and worked to get the best outcome I could have expected. I would definitely recommend them.
Phil at Puget Law Group has been amazing over the years on various legal issues I've had to hire him for. Highly recommended
This law firm is amazing! Not only do they get the job done, but they actually listen and understand to why you're there. No judgements! Just hard work to get you back on track.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hey Jock, Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you found our team at Puget Law Group both attentive and non-judgmental. Our goal is always to listen and work hard to support our clients, and it's wonderful to know we helped you get back on track.

reviews.text: Can’t recommend Phil su enough to thank him how much he has helped me, went above and beyond for me and will always be my lawyer from now on! If your looking for a lawyer that is dedicated and will always make sure he does his best for you, Phil su and puget law group should stop your search!

If you are looking for an attorney who really fights for you, I suggest you use Puget Law Group, all the staff is awesome! Phil Su was the attorney who helped me with my case, Phil is very knowledgeable and knows how to help you understand the crazy verbiage you hear in court and make sures you understand what's happening, so you're not so confused and lost.
They will get you the best outcome possible.

I refer anyone looking for an attorney to Puget Law Group !

Phil Su is the man always willing to help at the drop of hat always responds in a timely manner and the result is always a good a one thank you Phil for your excellent service and people skills. Great lawyer have never went anywhere else.

Phil Su has been my lawyer since day one and I’ve never needed to go anywhere else. Always quick with responding and taking care of me right away. Can’t recommend Phil and the firm enough! If you’re looking for assistants with any legal matter you won’t be disappointed.

The team at Puget Law Group are professional, yet personable and looking to help in any way they can.  They take the time to explain everything in detail so you can be comfortable knowing they have your back.  PGL should be your first call if the need arises.
Edward is a fantastic lawyer. He is my go to attorney for any type of auto accidents.  He represented my dad in a trucking case and did an amazing job, always following through with us on everything.

Edward and his team did a fantastic job on our case.  It involve a premise liability case involving a stairwell. He fought hard for years when we were lowballed by the insurance company.  He hired a top notch team of experts and poured countless hours into the case, ultimately leading to a 4.5 million award for us.

I can’t say enough good things about Le & Kittleson, especially Edward.  I sustained a traumatic brain injury from a trucking accident.   From the beginning, they were incredibly responsive every time I called or had a question, which made a big difference during a stressful time. They treated me with the utmost respect and took my concerns seriously. The team fought hard for my case, showing an impressive level of diligence and commitment. Thanks to their hard work and expertise, we achieved an excellent result. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of dedicated and professional legal representation!

Edward Le and his team fought for my case diligently which led to outstanding results. I suffered life altering injuries as a result of multiple auto accidents, one of which involved being rear-ended by a box truck. Scheduling and attending a consultation with Edward and his team was the best first step I took and it left me with confidence that I have an attorney by my side who is willing to help me recover the most for my injuries. He worked super hard to reach an excellent result for me, and did a superb job answering any questions I had. Edward has a strong reputation in the legal industry which is well earned through his care for his clients and track record of successfully winning many cases and settlements. I would highly recommend Edward as he's very respectful to his clients, dedicated to fighting for the best results, and always on top of things. Edward and his firm is unmatched as there are no other alternatives in the area that offer the superior level of experience and expertise, especially in fighting the insurance companies. I am a very satisfied client of Edward and know you will become another satisfied client of his. Please take my word and choose him to represent you in fighting for fair compensation for your injuries.
Le & Kittleson law firm did an amazing job on my case. Everything they promised they made it happen. Would highly recommend this firm for anyone else in need!

Our case was not going to settle for much until Ed and his team stepped in with their expertise. They saved our case and so much of our time. We wish we have gone to them a lot sooner. Ed’s reputation speaks for itself. Ed was also very personal and helpful beyond the case settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Trang!  I enjoyed working with you!

reviews.text: My case was relatively long due to COVID-19, but the Le & Kittleson team was able to make things possible whilst giving transparent consultations. One thing I would like to see better in the future for improvement would be the need to follow-up more with their clients rather than having to reach out so often (monthly basis). Overall, the experience has been great and would repeat again. Keep up the great work!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hanson, we thank you so much for your business and this review!

reviews.text: With all the positive reviews I can’t help but wonder if I went to a different office for help. I went out of my way from Seattle to this office and was turned away in 5 min. - Le couldn’t be bothered with my case since I hadn’t yet scheduled surgery - something that could have been discussed ahead of time. Then I went out of my way to follow up on my shoulder scans and, without even asking, my physician recommended surgery so I immediately followed up with Le’s office. The receptionist seemed annoyed that I asked her to text me a fax number to forward documentation to since I didn’t have a pen on hand. I asked them kindly to confirm if and when they receive the documents. A week went by and tried to call and text asking if it was received and no response. I’m in real pain and my mental and financial well being have been seriously altered by the City of Seattle but I guess my case isn’t worth the time of this office. In all professionalism they could have simply stated they weren’t really interested in my case to begin with.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sarah, during your 5–10-minute meeting with Mr. Le , you were indeed informed that we needed a fax concerning your upcoming surgery.  However,  we never received it.  If you would still like our legal help,  please fax the date of your surgery and the contact number of your surgeon. Call our office with any questions!

reviews.text:
My mom recently had personal injury case where the insurance companies were trying to have her settle for an amount that wouldn't even cover her medical bills and totaled vehicle.

Edward is an awesome attorney who genuinely cares and will do everything in his power to help you succeed. Going through an accident is a terrible experience but having an attorney you can trust really helps take the stress of the situation off you and your family. He took my mom's case to trial and won. My mom is the kind of person who is afraid to stand up for herself or ask for help, so thank you Ed, for standing up for my mom, anticipating her needs and getting her the help she deserves!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you Rhesa. It was an honor and privilege to represent your mother. Being able to give her a voice and fighting on her behalf is one of the reason why I chose to become a lawyer. I hope this case gave her closure and she is now able to move on with her life. Thank you for sharing.

Edward

reviews.text: Edward is an amazing attorney.  He fought my case hard for three years after the initial insurance company offered me peanuts.  He took my case to trial and did a fantastic job.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Adam!  It was our privilege to serve you!

reviews.text: They did an excel job with my case. I really appreciate the attention to detail and willingness to fight the insurance companies.

We recently ran into some technical problems that resulted in difficulties with our phone lines but have fixed the problem now. We understand your frustration and apologize for the inconvenience.

reviews.text: Edward and his law office members were outstanding to work with.  My attorney associated them in to help with my accident case.  They really go out of their way and worked hard on my case and made sure I got the maximum settlement for my case.  They kept me in the loop and always called me back when I had questions.  I am glad I had a legal team that always had my back. Ed really knows his stuff. I would recommend him to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for allowing us to help you!  And thanks for your review!

reviews.text:
Ed Le is the ultimate caring,  professional attorney. When my employer (self insured L&I) offered a very low settlement for my on the job head injury, he encouraged me to allow him to appeal and fight for a more equitable settlement. He was able to come to an agreement that we both found acceptable.
Highly recommended!

Best customer service and great results!
I honestly believe there is no better attorney in Seattle Area!
this firm really help me with compassion and integrity in my injury case
Good listener, better doer. Gets the job done and delivers what he promises.
Great lawyer
It's nearby, parking is a bit funny. I didn't get help for very long
The firm was always responsive to my calls .  They treated with respect everything we dealt with them.  They did what they promise
Edward and his staff are just great people.  They take good care of you and make sure that your concerns are always met.  I am glad that I hired them.

Edward and his firm are the best.  I got slammed by a truck and got hurt, went to the hospital, and eventually lost my job.  The insurance company treated me like crap and wouldn't pay my hospital bills.  I hired Ed and his firm fought hard to get me out of debt and then got me justice. He got me vocational retraining and I was able to get another job.  At the end, he recover a fair and equitable settlement for me just as he promised me he would.  This is the guy you want to hire.
Great attorney.  Straight shooter. Does what he say. Always professional.

I was sideswiped by a garbage truck that didn't look.  Ended up in the hospital for a week. Doctors told me I got a concussion, broke my collarbone, and a torn shoulder. Didn't want to hire an attorney. Just wanted to take care of my medical bills and time loss.  After truck drivers insurance company blamed me for being in his blind spot, I hired Ed and his crew. They got rolling on the ball immediately and got my bills paid. Got my employer to put me on short term disability and fought tooth and nail with the trucking company, who was being fed BS by their insurance company.  In the end, I got a good recovery which I used for rehab to this day.  Can't thank the firm and  Ed enough for getting me through hard times.

This firm provides top notch service.  I was in a wreck and was at wits end trying to cope with recovering.  I made an appointment and at the first time, all my problems were addressed.  They got my medical bills paid, dealt with my property damage in a fair way, and got me a super fair settlement after 6 months.  There was not a time that I called that they didn't try to help me.  I give them 7 stars if I could.
He's a great lawyer he took care of me.

Ed Le is a great personal injury lawyer. He'll get you results beyond your expectations. I am a court certified interpreter and throughout my career with the legal system over 25 years, I did almost a thousand depositions, arbitration hearings on car and work accidents and Ed is the lawyer that gets the highest settlement amount. He's aggressive and tough and he'll do what it takes to get you the best result. He got me a great settlement on my personal motor vehicle accident. You have to trust him WORK WITH HIM and listen to his advises and he WILL get you the result you want,. 5 stars is an understatement

Edward is best attorney in Washington state. He handled not only my case, but my brother, dad, and nephew. He has done well for all of them. He's professional and courteous.  And his guidance is top notch.

I am very grateful for the attorneys and staff at this firm. I was involved in a car accident as a passenger and was pretty badly injured. I've never thought or imagine in my life being involved in something like this. I was lucky enough to find them.  They were not only friendly and caring but were very attentive and supportive during this tough time. My injuries prevented me from being able to do the everyday things that I used to do.  Edward’s firm helped me reach my recovery and handled the stress of dealing with the insurance company and all the medical bills for me. I met all of the attorneys and the staff that worked on my case, which was a huge relief that I was able to put a face to the voices over the phone. Their location in Renton was easy to find and not far from where I live. I appreciate Edward’s firm and all his staff for helping me get through such a stressful and traumatic experience.
Edward is an amazing lawyer.  Gets results, does what he say, and always make promises that he keeps.  I am so glad he was my attorney.  I intend to refer everyone I know to him from now on.
Edward is a great lawyer. Very patient and god with clientes.

Just got off the phone 2 minutes ago. The receptionist did not introduce herself and was confused by my request for a consultation. I was passed to another who, at least, understood my request but was put on hold for me to talk to a paralegal. The paralegal, Monica, didn't even answer her phone.

Terrible customer service.
Edward is compassionate, always respectful, and the hardest working attorney that i know.  There was never a time that i ask for help and was ignore.  I am grateful to have him as my attorney.

Mr. Le is an honest and hard working attorney.  Once he takes your case, he works on it with his full heart and gives it his all.   There is nothing pretentious about him.  He does what he says.  I recommend him highly.

I've been with Edward K Le Firm for 2 yrs. and my experience with him has been more then  great, he treat me very friendly and show me that he cares and I'm not just one more case and thats whats matter, every time that I have request to talk to him he has been available, same experience with Monica Dominguez who has been my case manager all this time, she has been very professional and not just that she also make me to understand my case on my native language which is Spanish. everybody in Edward K.Le PLLC firm has been very friendly and I don't  have words  to say  thank you to tem. if on the future I'll have to hire an Attorney, Edward K.Le PLLC will be the one.

I had a bad car accident in Tacoma and I suffered a herniated disc that took a while to heal.  The semi truck that ran a red light and hit me then said it was my fault.  Classic case of he said/she said. I looked for an attorney who would fight for me. I found this firm and the reviews were universally positive and great. I hired them to represent me and the great reviews just scratched the surface of how good they were.  My attorney, Edward Le, didn’t hand off my case to an associate, he handled it himself. Edward spent a lot of time with me and going over step by step of the litigation procedure. He also showed great concern about me and that meant the world to us. Edward really cared about what I was going through and sincerely wanted the best for me. He went up against a tough insurance company that stalls and hates to part with a penny. Edward and his team never stopped pursing them and getting them to cooperate expeditiously. It was great that he was so accessible. I never had to leave endless messages for him to call me back and he never passed me off to an associate. He always took my calls and dealt with me personally. My case wasn’t a rain maker but he handled it as if it were. When he told me what the claim was settled for, I couldn’t believe it. I never thought it was going to be so much. It was very refreshing dealing with a man as caring and professional as he was. I wish I could have given him a higher rating than 5 stars.

Mr. Le lived up to all the ideals of what a lawyer should be - smart, kind, and principled. He is a brilliant tactician who knows how to plan and strategize for the best interest of his clients.  I know because I had an exceedingly tough liability case which 3 other lawyers turned down.  Yet, he took on my case and was able to guide me through one of the toughest times of my life.  It wasn't just the result that made me happy but also that he always believed in me and stuck to his principle of fighting to the end. All clients should be so lucky to have him.

I was involved in my first major accident many years ago and was seriously injured. The truck driver hit me but claimed it was my fault.  I was overwhelmed with insurance calls on both parties and dealing with hospital and surgery calls on a daily basis. I knew that I needed to seek for an attorney due to the significant injuries I had and because my vehicle was a total loss. I wanted to get the most out of my settlement claim as possible since I was not the driver at fault. Mr. Le was so kind to answer my questions the first time I called him even before I even hired him! He handled everything for me from insurance calls to my medical bills and worked hard to reach a satisfactory claim for me. I genuinely appreciate all his time and effort that saved me so much time and money. I could not have been happier with another attorney. If you want someone who is kind, honest, efficient, answers all your questions promptly and honestly - Mr. Le is the attorney to hire. Thank you Mr. Le for all that you have done for my case!

I  am so grateful to Edward.  He did a great job on my case and was able to assist me in obtaining the financial means to help me move on with my life and rehabilitation that I need. During the whole time he represented me, he kept me in the loop, explain my options and gave me sound advice.  Every move he made was strategically base toward the eventual outcome and in the end, we won just as Ed predicted.
This attorney has been good to our local community.  He has done a lot of Pro Bono work for several nonprofits and many clubs.  He is an asset to our city.

I previously had a bad experience with a lawyer before finally meeting Ed thanks to some good advice from a friend, but I was very cautious before meeting him. I have to say, I was very impressed, and my caution was unfounded. Ed was definitely the right person for the job, and he treated me with the utmost respect and courtesy. If you want the job done right, this is your man.

I previously had a bad experience with a lawyer before finally meeting Ed thanks to some good advice from a friend, but I was very cautious before meeting him. I have to say, I was very impressed, and my caution was unfounded. Ed was definitely the right person for the job, and he treated me with the utmost respect and courtesy. If you want the job done right, this is your man.

Brandon and his team did an excellent job with my case! I was involved in a pretty bad auto accident last October and worked with him through referral. He was proactive and walked me through every step of the way, and I was very pleased with the end results. He fought for me and worked directly with the insurance companies on a settlement we were all happy with.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for a PI attorney in the WA area. Brandon is awesome!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: The Feldman & Lee PS team is always here to provide exceptional patient care. We're glad to have made a positive impact!

reviews.text:
Exceptional Representation with Genuine Compassion

During a home remodel, my wife experienced an accident. Following consultations that suggested a potential case, we reached out to multiple attorneys. Brandon from Feldman & Lee responded promptly and showed both interest and empathy about our situation. Although my wife’s case differed from those he had previously managed, Brandon agreed to represent her due to his genuine commitment to helping clients.

He developed a well-considered legal strategy, engaged qualified professionals to provide expert safety testimony, and referred my wife to a medical specialist for a thorough evaluation of her condition. Brandon prepared a comprehensive demand and executed a highly effective approach which resulted in a settlement that exceeded our expectations.

Throughout the process, Brandon kept open and consistent communication, was readily available to address our questions, and acted with genuine intent to support our interests. He was always upfront, sincere, and compassionate. We recommend Brandon and his firm without reservation to anyone seeking representation in a personal injury matter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Every positive comment reinforces our commitment to quality care. The Feldman & Lee team is grateful for the trust placed in us.

reviews.text: Overall they do not answer their calls or call back. The few times they did answer the person that did answer had a hard time communicating and was hard to understand
I keep call them, they never answer the phone or call back to me

Trang Nguyen did a great professional job for my friends immigration case. She was so easy to talk with and made his case simple to understand. Thank you Trang for all your hard work and reasonable rate.

Trang Nguyen of Feldman and Lee attorney's in Kent,WA is just the best attorney I have used. She is very professional and understands immigration laws to help me with my case. The price for her service were very reasonable and she is worth so much more. She had to stand during my hearing 3 hours because the people did not offer her a chair so she stood without complaining. When she made the file for my case she did it so it was easy for the immigration officer  to read. I would recommend her to anyone who needs a great attorney she is simply the best in the world.

I was in a car accident 10/18 and was told this company and its employees were "good,  hard workers.
Mr Robert Reed handled my case and started off well, got the settlement for my totalled vehicle quickly.
But during my therapy and recovery, I kept getting bills from the tow company, fire department and hospital and Mr Reed kept asking me to submit the same paperwork over and over. I was in a second accident during this which probably complicated things a bit,  but Mr Reed worked through it.
Eventually settlement happened and Mr Reed got me a fair amount.
Here's where it gets unprofessional..
Mr Reed contacted me stating I should be recieving my checks within the week, I waited ten days and inquired and the response he gave me was "we held the checks untill you confirmed the address for us to send them to"...
During this whole case, from the start, I only used one address and why would they not ask if it was still the same? Instead they held my checks. But Here's the slap in the face!
Once my checks were delivered, whomever printed my checks, not only misspelled my name but also got my address incorrect!
Luckily my bank understood, and deposited without a issue. I will not use them again in the future...
reviews.ownerResponse: First, Mr. Moore, we are glad to know that everything went so well – the total loss payment for your vehicle, the handling of the complicated double collision and the settlements you received for both collisions, along with your wage loss.  As for the documents, it is firm policy and best legal practice to get copies of any and all documents a client receives regarding his/her case to assure no stone is left unturned when it comes down to settlement or trial – every client is asked to provide copies of such things to their attorney.  As for the delay in receiving your check, it is noted in the file that you were advised by email that your check was ready to pick up.   When you called a week later, you were informed about the email and you asked that the check be mailed.  Upon review of the checks issued to you, we see that the name on your checks match exactly the spelling of your name on your driver’s license.  However, I do see that the address on your check was missing a single digit, which is indeed our clerical error.  In closing, we are disappointed to know that despite all the good that came out of your case, this last item would cause you to think poorly of our firm, considering all the fine work that Mr. Reed and the Feldman & Lee staff completed on your behalf.

reviews.text: They are wonderful lawyers.
Great job for a really good price
Scam and Shady stay away for your own good.
Good
Top notch lawyers.

An amazing legal team at Beetham Tran Law Firm with Brett as the attorney for my personal injury car accident case.   I am glad to use them since they have experiences that I could not have done it myself.  There are certain aspects of car accident that they know, I certainly don't, and as a result the case got a surprised and unexpected settlement from insurance.

We were rear-ended and the car was totaled.  The other driver was under-insured but Brett worked with insurance and health care providers to make sure we are protected as if fully-insured.

I am really impressed with Brett's ability to outline the plan at the beginning and delivered results better than the plan.

The firm has nice folks to work with and keep you updated every step of the way.

Thanks Brett and the support team of Christine and Katie in this challenged endeavor with a professional result.

They got me as the go-to law firm forever.

It's unfortunate that I had three car accidents, but I’m so grateful to have worked with Brett on all three cases. He made the process so easy for me. Brett is highly experienced, communicative, and an absolute pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend him!

Unfortunately for me, this was my second time working with Brett...not in a bad way, but who wants to have to ever contact an attorney more then once in their life?  This review is based on my most recent experience.

Brett and Katie kept me notified every step of the way and made sure I didn't have any unanswered questions.  They went above and beyond to contact providers for me, when they didn't even need to and made sure my issues were resolved before they became issues.

Brett made sure to keep me personally up to date with any news on my case.  Would highly recommend.   You don't feel like what you think an attorney's office would...they take care of you and don't just write you off as another customer

If you are looking for a personal injury attorney, look no further! Brett and his team were outstanding in my case. They had great communication throughout the process, were extremely professional, and were always ready to answer any questions I had!

Excellent service, highly recommend Beetham Tran Law Firm, PLLC  to everyone. Thank you for my case everything 100%. Great people they will explain everything to you and will help you out until the end of the case!

If you need an amazing personal injury attorney, I HIGHLY recommend Brett Beetham and Beetham Tran Law Firm! I cannot thank Brett and Rochelle for the amazing service I received as their client! They are experienced, knowledgeable, helpful, kind and a pleasure to work with!

I was hit as a pedestrian in a crosswalk and my friend recommended Brett and Beetham Tran Law Firm after my accident and I’m so glad he did! Brett visited me in the hospital and thoroughly explained everything before I signed with his firm. I don’t want to even imagine the stress I would have had if I tried to deal with everything on my own. I had never hired an attorney before and am so thankful for him and his team! I was able to focus on healing and getting better while he advised and handled everything.

If I had any questions he always responded quickly and kept me updated on the case throughout the whole process. And he was so supportive through it all. He is so prepared and professional and awesome!

I am so grateful for the settlement I received. It was the best outcome and everyone worked so hard for it!!

Thank you Brett and your wonderful team!! Look forward to keeping in touch and if I ever need an incredible attorney I know who to call!! I wish you all the best!!

This is an excellent Law Firm for accidental damage cases. They are small enough to provide very good service on a one-on-one basis. Their fees are typical of the industry as a whole. 33 1/3 % for negotiated settlements and 40% for court settlements. You will not find lower rates out there unless you personally know an attorney. I prefer this attorney over the larger law firms where you're usually dealing with a legal assistant instead of directly with the attorney. Brett Beetham is knowledgeable and experienced and a true pleasure to work with. I will not be seeking another Law Firm to change to, I am a Beetham and Tran customer for life.

I recently just finished up a case with Thanh/Brett and I have to say they go above and beyond with every aspect of an attorney. At the time I was a 20 year old who found himself stuck in Seattle at midnight after a drunk driver ran a red light totaling my car that I had just saved up to finance. As confused as I was, my parents and I asked family members if they had any referrals for an attorney since none of us had been through something like this. Fortunately, I had a family friend who recommended Thanh stating how she’s taken care of them in the past. Being young, it’s hard to trust companies because most businesses want clientele for the numbers aspect opposed to out of genuine care of your well being. On day 1 since I was out of a vehicle, Thanh and Brett both drove 30 minutes out to meet me within walking distance. They were transparent, supportive and maintained consistent communication with me. If you’re browsing for an attorney that’s reliable, knowledgeable and will treat you like family, I’d have to say as blindly as I went into everything I came out knowing I had the best possible outcome. Financially, they managed to get 12% more than what I had aimed for so I’m not sure what more you could ask for out of your attorney.
Brett and team were awesome 🤩  I would definitely recommend their services. I am a happy and satisfied client.

I have gone to Beetham Tran Law Firm twice already and they have been so helpful with everything! They are very easy to reach and communicate with! Very friendly and nice! They also give you a clear understanding and go over all the details with you! I highly recommend going to them!

We highly recommend Beetham Tran Law Firm. Thanh and Brett are our personal injury lawyers and are the only firm we trust to refer our family and friends. Aside from their professionalism and expertise, they truly support and care for each case with a high level of importance. We especially appreciate their responsiveness and willingness to help and answer any questions. Good people for sure!

I really appreciated the support and services I got through Beetham Tran Law Firm and I would recommend to my family and friends. I was overloaded with stress trying to sort things out on my own, then got connected with Attorney Thanh Tran and she immediately understood what I was going through and my perspective. After consulting with several law firms before, I finally found someone I felt comfortable working with and can build trust with. Thanh, Brett, and assistant Katie helped me tremendously in making sure I was getting the care I needed to fully recover and informing me every step of the way. It lifted off so much stress I was experiencing when Thanh and Brett took me on as a client and I entrusted them to help me with my case. My mood and recovery improved so much because of it. As a Physical Therapist and small business owner, I look for quality members of our community here in the south Seattle/Renton area to refer patients to.  I first heard about Beetham-Tran Law from a patient I was treating. Her auto accident case wasn’t going so smooth so she retained Brett as her lawyer. Since then we have shared a handful of patients and it has been the consistent experience of all my patients who have used him and his wife.  A bonus is his wife speaks Vietnamese which is a huge help to the Asian American community to have a voice in the personal injury industry to be heard and attended to.  Their team has been a tremendous resource to my staff and I’ve also really appreciated Katie at the front desk and how prompt and friendly she answers the phone. If you ever get into a personal injury situation, I highly recommend Beetham-Tran Law Firm!

reviews.text:
I would absolutely always recommend
NOVO Legal to anyone who is afraid of applying for status!!

From the very beginning of my immigration journey, Luis was nothing short of extraordinary. Immigration cases can be overwhelming and deeply emotional, but he immediately put me at ease with his professionalism, compassion, and clear expertise. Throughout the entire process, he was incredibly knowledgeable and always took the time to explain every step in a way that made me feel informed and empowered.

Luis was consistently timely and detail-oriented, staying on top of every document, deadline, and update. I never once felt like my case was just another file on his desk. His responsiveness and dedication made it clear that he truly cared about my outcome, and that level of commitment is something that is rare and deeply appreciated.

What stood out most to me was how personally invested Luis was in my case. He treated my situation as if he were defending his own family, advocating for me with integrity, determination, and heart. Because of him, I never felt afraid that something might go wrong — I felt protected, supported, and confident every step of the way.

In a time where immigration in the United States feels especially scary and uncertain, I truly believed there was a chance I would not be granted my green card. Luis worked tirelessly to make sure that did not happen. Thanks to his dedication and skill, I was recently granted my residency — a life-changing outcome that means everything to me.

Because of Luis, I am able to remain in this country with my family, and most importantly, with my son. I am endlessly grateful for his hard work, compassion, and unwavering support. I could not have asked for a better advocate by my side, and I would recommend him without hesitation to anyone in need of an outstanding immigration attorney.

I am forever grateful to Luis and his whole office staff and team!!! Si se pudo!!! 🥹❤️🥳

Luis Cortes and his team at Novo Legal Group did a great job with my case. From our very first call to the last contact, it was clear that Luis is extremely knowledgeable, proactive, and strategic. He took the time to clearly explain all available options and walked me through multi-step plans every step of the way. The rest of the Novo Legal Group is equally professional, attentive, and responsive.

Luis Cortes is a fantastic immigration lawyer who helped through filing with USCIS, completing interviews, and approval. He was prompt, professional, knowledgeable, helpful, and empathetic every step of the way. His own lived experience as an immigrant combined with his legal expertise is a powerful combination. We deeply appreciate Luis for getting us through a stressful process.

I have full confidence in recommending Luis and his colleagues/teams for folks needing supporting with US immigration matters.

I’m so grateful to have found Luis Cortes Romero of the Novo Legal Group. He was pivotal in helping us navigate the USCIS processes.

The paperwork and the documentation is daunting but Mr. Cortes Romero answered every question with the upmost respect, patience, kindness, and professionalism. He even came to California to the immigration interview. I’m truly grateful for his help and expertise. I recommend him to all my friends and loved ones 🙏🏼
Luis Cortes has been helping me since 2018. His compassion and kindness are unbelievable to his clients. I am grateful for his help and support.

I don’t know when they find time to sleep while busy being literal heroes. My family was brought back together in 2019, and then again this year, thanks to Luis and team. In today’s climate, we might never stop looking over our shoulders, but knowing we have a team like this to back us up brings much comfort.
Carmen gave me very good service. Excellent
Thank you so much, I am very grateful for your support in these procedures to Carmen ☺️ I am very grateful. God bless you always 🙏

I am very happy with the service I am receiving and I thank God and Novo Legal Group, especially Ms. Carmen from the Kent office and her team of lawyers.

I hope, God willing, that my case will continue and reach a positive outcome. I place my trust in God and the lawyers at Novo Legal Group.
I am truly very happy. 🙏🙏🙏

Very happy with the service they provided me. Thankful to God and to Novo Legal for having my work permit. Thankful to Miss Carmen for her excellent service and for being so attentive throughout the entire process.

It is the best team that I could have, thanks to their lawyers and paralegals who were always aware of my case and especially to lawyer Luis who was the best in everything from legal help and I felt very comfortable with his assistance.
Excellent service from attorney Luis Cortez and assistant Priscilla. Thank you very much for your support and kind treatment.
Excellent service thanks to attorney Luis Cortes and Priscilla, very kind and attentive to my case. Good job.

I was in the legal process with attorney Luis Cortez in 2018, who was always attentive and resolved my case in the best way possible. It took a little while due to the slow immigration system, but in the end, it was resolved satisfactorily. I NOW HAVE MY PERMANENT RESIDENCY!!! Thank you, attorney Luis Cortez, and especially to Ms. Pricila, who is always there to mediate when the attorney is busy, always clarifying my doubts and helping me with all the necessary paperwork!!! I think the paid service is very good, but the service they provide out of genuine compassion is priceless! Thank you so much!!!!!!!!🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡

Really appreciated all the support novo legal group provided. They were consistently patient with our process that needed to stop and start a bunch our end and answered all our questions when we had concerns and fears about our process.

I originally started my process with Luis back in 2017 it’s been a long process I been switch around with different people here and there which it made it a little frustrating, but I get it with Covid and everything that’s been happening. then they switched me to Diana Alvarado which I’m very pleased with her work she was and still is great she answered all my questions and concerns, great communication always updating me on everything. Thank you Diana

We worked with Diana Alvarado and she was amazing after going through so many different paralegals she took our case. She got right back to us with any questions we had I never had to wait to long and was treated with kindness and respect. I highly recommend working with them.

We're very happy with the service we received. We've been with them since they were called Barrera Legal, but now that they're now Bajo Novo Legal, our experience has improved, and that's thanks to Carmen! She made the work permit renewal process transparent and clear!

We were referred to Novo Legal and started working with them back in 2018 and due to the pandemic and other understandable circumstances, we are still working with them. There was a point in our journey that we were feeling like we were forgotten about and taken seriously. Then, we finally got Laura Sanchez working on our case and she was extremely helpful with getting our case moving, keeping us updated along the way. Within months we finally heard from the USIC. After we this portion of the process was final, we were working with another person then we started working with Diana Alvarado. She was just as understanding and helpful. We were expecting that the emails with her would be like the others and would respond to us within a week. But we were surprised that she was on top of everything and very quick at responding to our questions and concerns. These two amazing ladies have made us feel seen again! We cannot express how grateful and appreciative we are to them!

I had the pleasure of working with attorney Luis Cortes Romero and his exceptional paralegal, Carmen Martinez - at Novo Legal from the Kent office. I couldn't be more impressed with their professionalism and dedication. Attorney Cortes not only possesses extensive legal knowledge but also a genuine commitment to his clients' best interests. He took the time to thoroughly understand my case and provided clear, strategic guidance every step of the way. Carmen's attention to detail and proactive communication ensured that all aspects of my case were handled efficiently.

Gracias Luis y Carmen por todo! 👏

I contacted Karen and explained my situation. During my conversation with her I concluded she was the one. I was impressed with the breadth and depth of her knowledge. She was clearly experienced and well educated.

She represented me with confidence, intelligence, thoroughness, and with care. She and her staff kept me up-to-date on their progress with the case as they diligently kept the ball rolling. She certainly won’t back down from a fight.

I “highly recommend” Attorney Karen Scudder. I am very satisfied with her work. Hopefully, I will never be a victim of such an accident again, but if so, Karen Scudder is, without hesitation, my go-to attorney.
