We found ourselves in what seemed to us to be a pretty complex accident that, without representation, would most certainly be bullied right into the ground by the insurance company.

After reading reviews, weighing our options and (tbh) the proximity to our house we decided to have our first sit down with Karen at GSLF.
It turned out to be the only law firm we would visit.

Karen was professional, knowledgeable and very personable. Karen walked us through our options, explained the pros, cons and most likely outcomes with the foundations of the case we had brought. The fees and finances were transparent, fair and honest.
Karen even set us up with a couple recommendations to pursue treatment for our injuries.

After our visit the weight of the accident was literally lifted off our shoulders. All we had to do was worry about getting better. I couldn't have imagined a better outcome and to think we were thinking there was going to be numerous visits with lawyers.

Karen kept us up to date every step of the way via email. We never questioned what was going on. Karen received a couple offers from the insurance company and asked us if she could decline them. This impressed us. She seemed to fight really hard for us. Our settlement was much more than we anticipated after researching 'like' cases.

Update-
To our surprise, in the middle of writing this review we received an email from Karen. She had kept fighting the insurance company and was not satisfied with what they were taking for subrogation. We had yet another check coming for she had saved us another thirty percent off our subrogation totals!
We are in awe of the GSLF family, in particular Karen and all of the work they put into our case.

We highly recommend the GREANY SCUDDER LAW FIRM FAMILY!

Erik was responsive, thorough, and consistently one step ahead. If you’re dealing with a complex business dispute or need someone who can navigate high-stakes legal challenges, Erik is absolutely the attorney you want in your corner.

reviews.ownerResponse: I do not represent anyone named or nicknamed Dee. This is a solo practice, so there aren't multiple attorneys here. Meaning none of my clients ever pay money to me directly ever.

Marco at M&T Injury Law was wonderful to work with. After my husband and I were in a minor car accident, he took care of everything and made the whole process so much less stressful. He was kind, professional, and always kept us updated. We’re very grateful for his support and highly recommend him

I cannot speak highly enough to my level of respect and appreciation for Marco and Komo, and I hope anyone in search for solid representation finds this review first. I’ve found that aside from being good attorneys, they complete their job with immaculate grace due to their character. Good people make great lawyers too, the level of care I received while working with Marco since 2022 was literally life changing. I was hit by an intercity transit bus and my recovery process was riddled with physical and in result mental challenges, including losing my Dad and Grandma within 5 months. As a former D1 and professional athlete, my frustrations with my injuries were always met with patience and understanding. Not once was I just talking to an attorney, it was speaking with someone who genuinely cared; someone who is at the root an honorable and sincere person. Marco handled my case with a previous firm before beginning his own, and my experience with him was one that built an abundance of trust and great rapport. The communication was constant, weekly or at least biweekly check-in’s, not just for the status of my case but an extension of him caring for you as a person. After facing devastating negligence from my previous attorney, I called Marco just as someone who I trusted with the questions I now had as far as moving forward with what happened to me. I think that when handling so much, especially when injured, it is easier to be taken advantage of. Unfortunately I had experienced this with my previous representation; dishonesty and feeling disregarded completely as a human being. Marco, even while working at a previous firm, always made me feel seen, heard and valued. There was never a moment in the 3+ years of knowing him that I ever had to question what was going on. I cannot express how valued I always felt as a client and as an individual, legalities aside. You never want to have an attorney who just sees you as dollar signs, a pay check or an opportunity. Marco is extremely personable and great at what he does, and him and Komo make an amazing team. Their communication is the epitome of what you’d want with an attorney. Their knowledge and patience in explaining the processes and keeping you informed create the peace-of-mind necessary to navigate such situations that come with injury, lawsuits and settlements. His partner Komo is amazing as well, they are a dream team. I can’t express enough how they quite literally saved the day, providing me with the ability to trust others again with a huge part of my life. I placed it in their hands, heavily influenced on the experience I had with Marco and knowing he is someone to trust. As sad as I was when he moved on from the firm I originally began working with him, I am beyond happy and relieved that he now has his own because he is top tier when it comes to legal representation and being an overall good person to have in your corner.

I can honestly say that these attorneys are very professional at what they do. You can trust them. As far as my experienced, I am very pleased of them helping me about my case. I highly recommend them to you. Thank you very much! I appreciate you!

Thank you, Attorney Komo and Attorney Marco. As professionals and as people, you are the best. In my car accident, I was severely affected and didn't know what to do. They took my case, and I was soon on my medical treatment. They were always in communication, and they sought the best compensation for me as a client. I recommend them; they are the best attorneys.

I'm grateful to Attorneys Komo and Marco. They did an excellent job in my car accident case, as a passenger and deeply affected, and they did everything possible to provide me with treatment and compensation during this difficult process. I recommend them as professionals; they are special people.

I am so grateful to Attorneys Komo and Marco for their excellent work. They were attentive throughout, always seeking what's best for their clients and fighting your case with excellence. They always achieve the best and fairest outcome for their clients. I highly recommend them; they are the best. It was a very difficult and painful process for our family; my husband and two of my children were tremendously affected, and they were a great blessing.

Excellent attorneys. I'm so grateful. They handled my case and my children's and did an excellent job. They were always in communication with us. They were attentive to our entire treatment and fought for the best compensation, always thinking of the client's best interests.

While my accident has been one of the hardest things to go through in my adult life, Marco and his team have made it so easy helping me through this process. They use words that I will understand. The communication and constantly checking up on me has been top tier. I would highly recommend M&T to anyone in a similar situation. I hope and pray I’ll never have to reach out to them again, but if I do, they will be my first call.

Komo and Marco helped me to get compensation from a car accident, which an auto insurance company had denied its client fault initially. The team did a mazing job defending my rights in a few weeks. I was well informed and guided through all steps. I definitely recommend this law firm to my relatives, friends and others.

I want to express my sincerest gratitude to M&T Injury Law for all the support and dedication they provided to my husband's case after his accident. During such a difficult time for our family, having such a professional and compassionate team made all the difference.

Marco and Komo's commitment to my husband was evident in every detail: from the personalized attention to the firm and professional manner in which they defended his rights against the insurance companies when we thought there was no chance of winning. Thanks to their effort and experience, we were able to obtain fair compensation that will allow my husband to focus on his recovery without so many worries.

Beyond the outcome, what we appreciate most is the humane, personal, and empathetic treatment we received at all times. They weren't just lawyers; they were also a great support during a difficult process for us.

We highly recommend M&T Injury Law to anyone who needs trustworthy lawyers after an accident. They are an honest, dedicated team with huge hearts. Siempre estaremos agradecidos por todo lo que hicieron por mi esposo y por nuestra familia.

I am incredibly grateful to Marco and Komo, wonderful people and professionals. They helped me in record time and, most importantly, they collaborated with me. My case was a car accident, which I handled with other lawyers who closed my case. They introduced me to this great law firm, who took my case and resolved it in less than 24 hours. I was under a lot of stress and anxiety because I hadn't had any positive results in my case.
Thank you so much. I highly recommend M&T Injury Law. 🙏

Marco and the people at M&T really helped me out during one of the craziest, most stressful moments in my recent years. We’re very transparent about processes and answered every and all my questions along the way. Highly recommend them if you’re ever in need of a good law firm

I can’t thank my attorneys Komo and Marco enough for everything they’ve done for me and my daughter after our car accident. From the very beginning, they went above and beyond not just handling our case, but truly caring about our well-being every step of the way.
They were always incredibly communicative, answering calls and questions promptly even after regular business hours and took the time to explain every part of the process in detail so I always felt informed and supported. What stood out most was that they genuinely put our needs first, showing more concern for our recovery and peace of mind than anything else.
I’m so grateful to have had them by our side during such a stressful time, and I highly recommend Komo and Marco to anyone in need of attorneys who truly care. Thank you both for your dedication and compassion!
Every opportunity I can I will recommend them to anyone who is in need of service!! 10/10 across the board.

I wasn’t directly involved in my husband’s car accident case, but I watched from a distance as everything unfolded and Komo and Marco truly came through for him in a way that deserves major recognition. Komo was sharp, focused, and clearly knew what he was doing. He guided my husband through the legal process with honesty, confidence, and professionalism. Even with all the stress and delays, Komo stayed consistent and made sure my husband was treated fairly and fought for. And Marco what a gem. He was the one constantly communicating with my husband, walking him through every question, concern, and update without ever sounding tired or annoyed. Somehow, even in the middle of all the legal mess, they managed to share jokes and keep the mood light. Marco really helped take some of the weight off my husband’s shoulders, which meant a lot especially since this was one of the most overwhelming times of his life. Even though we were separated and I wasn’t there physically, I could see how supported he felt with Komo and Marco by his side. They didn’t just handle the case they helped him feel like he wasn’t alone in it.
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
If you’re looking for a team that’s professional, reliable, and real these are your guys. They got the job done and brought some laughter along the way. I’m truly thankful they were there for him.

After going through one of the hardest and most emotional times of my life following a car accident, I truly don’t know what I would have done without the incredible support I received from Komo, my attorney, and Marco, my case manager. These two were not just a legal team they became my support system, my voice when I felt unheard, and my calm during a storm.
Komo was everything you’d want in a lawyer professional, knowledgeable, and determined to get me the settlement I truly deserved. He kept it real with me, never sugarcoated things, and always made sure I understood what was happening at each stage of the case. I trusted him completely, and he never gave me a reason to doubt that I was in the right hands. But as much as Komo led the legal charge, I also have to say this: Marco was the heart of the whole experience.
Marco, my case manager, was an absolute blessing. From the very beginning, he made me feel like I mattered. He was the one consistently checking in, making sure paperwork was on track, answering every question I had (and I had a lot), and doing it all with so much patience and kindness. There were moments when I felt overwhelmed, emotionally drained, or just completely lost in the process and Marco was always right there with a steady voice and reassuring words. He took the time to explain things in a way I could understand and never made me feel like I was a burden, even when I called or messaged more than once in a day.
But what meant the most to me was the way Marco made me feel human again. We had real conversations. He didn’t just talk to me about documents and deadlines - he asked how I was doing as a person. We even shared laughs throughout the process, and that honestly kept me going. Being able to laugh, even during one of the darkest chapters of my life, reminded me that there was still light and Marco was a huge part of that.
He truly went above and beyond for me, and I can say with all my heart that he cares deeply about the people he works with. He never treated me like just a case number. He treated me with compassion, respect, and warmth something you don’t often find in legal environments. I honestly felt like I had a brother on the inside who was making sure things moved forward and that I wasn’t forgotten.
Together, Komo and Marco made a powerful team. They helped me reach a settlement that reflected everything I went through the pain, the struggle, the losses, and the healing. But beyond the legal victory, they gave me a sense of peace and support during a time when I didn’t know if I could keep going.
To anyone going through a car accident or personal injury case: please, don’t try to do it alone. Komo and Marco will not only fight for you they’ll care for you. And that makes all the difference.
Thank you both for being in my corner. You helped me survive one of the hardest experiences of my life, and I’ll never forget it.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ | A True Blessing
Reviewed by Corey & Kay Lovejoy

Having Marco on our side was everything we didn’t know we needed. Day in and day out, he showed up — guiding us through each step, making sure our case was flawlessly handled.

Marco didn’t just support us — he protected our peace.

Forever grateful.

I would definitely recommend Dore Law!

reviews.text: Truly a great group to get the job done! They glitchy hard to get my wife’s settlement and they did so a lot sooner than expected. They are also fighting for additional funds that my wife deserves because the other driver was underinsured!
reviews.ownerResponse: Your feedback is greatly appreciated. We aim to serve our clients consistently and effectively, and we are thrilled to hear that we got your wife's settlement settled quicker than expected. We remain committed to ensuring your wife gets the additional funds she deserves. We thank you for your trust, and we hope to maintain this high standard in our future interactions.
Thanks Devan!

reviews.text: Very professional and helpful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Christine, Thank you very much for taking the time to share your thoughts about your experience with Dore Law Group PLLC. We are delighted to know that our professionalism and helpfulness met your expectations. Your positive feedback serves as a great testament to our unwavering commitment to our clients. Please know that we are here to assist you with any future legal requirements. We sincerely appreciate your recommendation and look forward to servicing your needs again.

reviews.text: Attorney Jim Dore really fights for his clients. He is a highly skilled litigator and gets the best results. He is    always my first choice.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Mr. Hughes, Thank you for taking the time to share your positive feedback about your experience with Dore Law Group PLLC and specifically, Attorney Jim Dore. We are delighted to know that you find our services effective and satisfactory. It is our firm's mission to ensure that we fight diligently for our clients. Your kind words and patronage inspire us to continue providing the highest level of legal representation.

reviews.text: Company never follwed threw
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Mr. Stone, We are deeply conerned to read of your less than satisfactory experience with Dore Law Group PLLC. Following through with our commitments to clients is something we take very seriously, and we apologize if your experience did not reflect that. We value your feedback and we would like to discuss the situation personally with you. Please call us at your earliest convenience or you can provide us with a good time to reach you. Our goal is to make this right and ensure that clients' needs are properly taken care of.

reviews.text: My case had some very troubling obstacles that I doubt I would have hade the patience or tenacity to see through to the end.  My Attorney, Elisabeth Ruff and para legal Jenny Lacobucci were doggedly determined to see things through.  They persevered and I received a nice reward.  The real benefit was that I just handed them everything that came in (and there were so many moving parts)  They explained things to me thoroughly, and then handled them all.  The whole team at Adler Giersch was a true pleasurer to work with .  I would not hesitate to employ them again and will recommend them to my friends and family.  Just like they were recommended to me by my dear friend.

Steve Angles, and his team of Sabrina and Heather were top notch.  I can't recommend them highly enough.  They helped me navigate some very difficult situations that helped me get the best possible result.  Thank you AG Team!

I can't say enough good things about Steve Anglés and his amazing team. The outstanding work they did on my injury claim. From the very first conversation, I felt heard, supported, and genuinely cared for—not just as a client, but as a person.

Their communication was absolutely top notch. Every question I had (and I had many!) was answered quickly, clearly, and with so much patience. I was never left wondering what was going on or what the next step would be. They made a complex and stressful situation feel manageable, and even empowering.

The team was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. You can tell they truly care about their clients and are passionate about fighting for what's right. I always felt like I had strong, compassionate advocates on my side—and the outcome of my case reflected that dedication.

If you're looking for a law firm that combines expertise with heart. I’m beyond grateful for their help and would recommend them without hesitation to anyone dealing with an injury claim.

Thank you, Steve Anglés, for everything!

I have to take the time to write this review about Adlier Giersch and specifically Steven Angles and Sabrina Horne. Wow what a team they make , they are super thorough, honest and always transparent about what is happening, what are the next steps, what to expect and most of all are there to support whatever you need. Thanks so much and will highly recommend them to anyone in need

Adler Giersch has an exceptionally professional team that provided tremendous support to my parents during their case. Navigating insurance matters after an accident can be incredibly stressful, but working with Steven Anglés, Elizabeth Ruff, and Carol Fritsch made the experience much more manageable. In the end, my parents reached a resolution they were very satisfied with. Throughout the entire process, it was clear that the Adler Giersch team is deeply committed to achieving the best outcomes for their clients. They are compassionate, dedicated, and thorough. Their communication was excellent, and I truly believe my parents received the best care possible.

Most won’t read reviews.. please take the time to understand this situation.
First of all, let’s start with the end in mind. My wife received her settlement.
The professionalism of this firm and the help and guidance from Steve was first class. He knows what he’s doing.
My wife and I were on a cruise in Alaska and while visiting one of the ports, my wife (a pedestrian) was struck by a vehicle attempting to cross the street.
She suffered a concussion and internal bleeding in her brain. We were airlifted to Seattle where she spent days in intensive care.
My wife took months to recover.
Medical bills , transportation costs , and loss of work were the last things we worried about because of the guidance from this firm.
Long story short , this firm handled everything, and I mean everything. Zoom meeting after zoom meeting were very informed of the necessary steps we needed to take while being kept in the loop of all the steps Steven and firm were taking. Very upfront , very honest, and very helpful.

I truly appreciate how they went above and beyond to make sure all necessary expenses were taken care of.

My wife is fully recovered.

Just wanted to take the time to show our appreciation of what this team was able to accomplish.

Thank you.

I cannot recommend Steven Angles and his team especially Carol, highly enough. From our initial consultation to the final resolution of my case, their professionalism, expertise, and dedication were evident every step of the way.
Personalized Attention: Unlike many firms where you might feel like just another case number, and they want you to sign their contract right away, Mr. Angles took the time to understand my situation and address all of my concerns. His approach was tailored specifically to my needs, ensuring I felt supported and informed throughout the entire process.
Expertise and Knowledge: Their deep understanding of personal injury law was apparent. They provided clear explanations of my legal options, and their strategic advice proved invaluable. It was clear that Mr. Angles not only knows the law inside and out but also has a keen understanding of how to leverage it to benefit their clients.
Effective Communication: Communication was prompt and transparent. and Mr. Angles was always available to answer any questions I had. This level of accessibility and openness made a significant difference in easing my anxiety throughout the legal process.
Compassion and Integrity: Beyond his legal skills, Mr. Angles demonstrated genuine compassion and integrity. They were truly invested in my well-being and showed a level of care that made me feel valued as a client.
If you’re seeking a personal injury lawyer who combines expertise with a heartfelt commitment to their clients, look no further than Mr. Angles His exemplary service not only delivered results but also made a challenging time in my life more manageable.
Thank you, Mr. Angles
Sincerely,
Stacy G.

I had never been in an accident, so I didn't know what to expect. Mr. Angles (Steve) & Carol Fritsch were with me every step of the way. With very helpful advice, encouragement (a lot of that) what to except & how to go about it. They were kind, easy to talk to, but most of all very genuine and concerned.  Big or small doesn't matter. I would trust them (Adler Giersch PS) over & over. Pick-up the phone & call them you will be so happy you did. I sure am. Sincerely, Sharrel Counsellor

Steve Anglés and his team were amazing! After getting in a hit-and-run car accident with my two kids and needing some extra help with physical therapy, my auto insurance wanted to close out my claim far too early. Steve was generous enough to give me a couple of hours of his time to help me work through how to negotiate with the insurance company. Over the period of a year, I had to work back and forth with my insurance to get different medical bills payed and his team checked in on me consistent to ensure I was able to get what I needed and eventually resolve the claim to the end. I couldn’t be happier with their service and would definitely call them again if I ever need help with a claim.

I could not have navigated the process following my car accident without the team at Adler Giersch. From dealing with my medical insurance to recommending the right type of doctor, I honestly don't know if I would be healthy or even sane without them. they went above and beyond. Their compensation doesn't even come close to what their help was worth to me.

The wonderful team at Adler Giersch helped me through a long, complicated claim. They were always quick to respond to my questions/concerns and took care of everything. Not only do they have great knowledge and expertise, but they are kind, compassionate, and understanding every step of the way. I was provided with exceptional communication and excellent service. I would definitely recommend them to friends and family.

Carol and Steven were extremely helpful all throughout the process and were able to walk me through the paperwork and steps needed, helping me to be able to get through this. Both of them were quickly and well able to answer any question I had when I needed to call them. Without them I wouldn't have been able to get as far as I have.

I truly thank Steve and Carol for their tremendous help and support while I dealt with the other party's insurance company and received a reasonable settlement, including reimbursement to my own insurance. Steve broke things down clearly and concisely in a way that was easy to understand and provided me with options we could pursue as well as possible outcomes. However, in the end it was my decision.  It was good to be part of the discussion and able to ask questions freely as well.  I feel he is a very open, honest, forthright, and personable attorney. Those are the kind of attorneys you want to work with. I would definitely recommend him. His assistant, Carol was also on top of things and responded to my questions very quickly in a friendly, professional manner.  She is great too! Top notch attorney and firm.
Very kind helpful to have by your side during a stressful time. They got the job done with great results

Mr. Angles, Maritza and Carol where phenomenal to work with during a very stressful time.  The group is extremely professional, patient and thorough in explaining my options every step of the way. I felt like the Mr. Angles  and team truly cared about my well-being from the start. In fact, Mr. Angles periodically checked in on my progress before I ultimately decided to hire him. He provided me with great guidance to ensure I received the best care possible and allowed me to solely focus on my recovery rather than dealing with the insurance companies and piling doctors bills on my own - that alone was a huge weight lifted off my shoulders.

Maritza was great to work with, she was thorough and prompt with her responses and was quick to answer any potential questions as well as coordinating appointments with Mr. Angles.

High recommend!! Mr. Angles is an expert in his field, he is kind, compassionate, transparent and has YOUR best interest in mind and will fight for the biggest settlement.

I had hoped to get the maximum payout when I engaged Steve and his team to represent me. But Steve actually got me more, due to his extensive knowledge of how insurance companies work. I had met with several other attorneys, but they had little interest in what they must have perceived as a small case. Steve came highly recommended, and he did not disappoint. Before I met Steve, I was being harassed by the 2 insurance companies, yet I ended up needing to have my hip replaced due to a car accident. I am so grateful to Steve and Maritzia for their hard work. Steve has called me back at night, on weekends, on vacation. Honestly, I felt heard and cared for.  At a time when everything was spinning out of control, Steve was my rock.  Five stars just doesn't seem enough.

Steven J. Angles is an exceptional attorney with a heart and an essential sense of humanity. I absolutely recommend Steven with the highest regards not just for his professional diligence, legal guidance, effectiveness, and persistence, but also for his unstinting kindness and compassion. I write this with the deepest gratitude for his valuable guidance through a most challenging time in my life following a car accident. I engaged Adler-Giersch for personal injury representation upon the recommendation of a trusted lawyer friend. I consider myself extremely fortunate that Steven handled my case with help from Maritza from beginning to its conclusion three years later. All the glowing recommendations he has received are well-deserved, and I’m proud to add mine for the exceptional service and kindness I received from him.

Steve Angles is an excellent Attorney! He and Maritza did a great job explaining the process to me and always being available to answer questions. Steve was able to settle my case for the full amount of money available including my underinsured motorist coverage. Thanks again Steve for doing a great job!

Steven Angles is a committed, ethical, skilled lawyer and a really kind, generous human being! He takes time to understand you and what you have been through. He and his paralegal, Maritza, are an amazing, efficient team. They respond promptly to any enquiries and go the extra mile to assist their clients. I felt like I had a strong protector on my team in so many ways. Adler Giersch is an excellent firm with a great reputation. Obviously they take the time to hire the best and train their support staff really well. I am so beyond happy with the results of my case and how carefully and thoughtfully it was established. Steven Angles can see all sides and that is a real advantage. Do not hesitate, you will be well-represented!!!

Due to an accident in the summer of 2018, we needed a law firm that could look out for our mom due to her injuries as well as loss of business. After doing research and meeting with different law firms, we ultimately decided to go with Adler Giersch. We felt that they had extensive experience in brain injuries and also gave us the most confidence after meeting with the different firms. We worked with Steven Angles (lawyer) and Maritza Moreno-Sanchez (paralegal) from the very beginning and we couldn’t have asked for a better duo during the process. Steven gave great, constructive, and sound advice and knew some of the top specialists in the state when it came to brain injuries. Maritza did a great job in handing all the medical records and keeping track of our mom’s medical care. They were responsive and were always willing to meet with us whether it was virtual or in-person to help answer our questions along the way.

However, the journey wasn’t easy. There were ups and downs throughout the process. The only word of caution we have is that you need to have patience. From start to finish, our mom’s case took about 2.5 years and there were times when we wanted faster resolution.There were many times of great frustration and exhaustion for our family dealing with this situation but in the end Steven and Maritza came through and gave us a result that was better than what we had expected. They made sure to exhaust every resource and every possible avenue to ensure our mom was fairly compensated for her injuries and loss of business. We would highly recommend Adler Giersch and specifically Steven/Maritza if you need representation that will fight on your behalf! We cannot thank Steven and Maritza enough for all of their efforts and hard work!

I have been in a couple no-fault accidents and thankfully found Adler-Giersch.  My first accident I had to recover from my own insurance PIP and who would have thought this would be difficult .  I was amazed at how well Adler Giersch handled it and got me maximum care at all levels.
My second accident was very similar and I immediately knew who to call for realistic, professional advice. Steven Angels and Carol spoke with me several times on the phone and provided free consultation. I really felt like a client and a customer as opposed to the next payoff.  Steven kept things realistic and guided me towards the best outcome.  I would highly recommend Adler-Giersch, Steven Angels or anyone associated with this group.  Appreciate your compassionate service and support.

In July 2018, my husband and I were in a terrible auto accident, I walked away but my husband was life flighted to Harborview, it was a horrific time and as soon as reaching out to Adler Giersch, I only had to focus on the care of my husband.  Richard, Steve, their paralegals MaryEllen and Maritza arrived at the hospital and from that moment they handled everything, I MEAN everything. It is 2021 and we are finally able to say that we can breathe again and it is all in thanks to their hard work.  I hope one never needs to call them, but if you do, you will find the most hard working, understanding, kind and professional group of people.  They were my support and always there at a seconds notice through the maze we had to travel.

I highly recommended Steven Angles at Adler Giersch. I was referred to them by a friend from Church and then to Steven by one of my doctors. He was highly qualified to deal with the type of head injury that I sustained.
My mom and I were rear-ended on I-5 in Tacoma. I suffered a traumatic Brain injury with concussion, neck and back issues. It was overwhelming most of the time for me dealing with headaches and pain on a daily basis.  On top of that I had to deal with all of the doctor’s appointment and therapy that comes with a car accident.
For me it was great having Steven and Maritza handling my case and dealing with the insurance company.
They always put my needs and concerns first throughout the entire process. They worked a lot with my husband through the process, because of the pain that I was in most of the time.
Gary and I want to thank both Steven and Maritza for all they did to bring my case to a wonderful conclusion.
Cheryl S

Steve and Carol have been such an incredible support system for myself and my partner as we traversed the web of confusion with insurance and the claim surrounding a traumatizing bike/car accident that put my partner out of work for a year and had such a wide sweeping impact on both of our lives. They were so kind, informative and thorough and kept us at ease through the entire process and i can't imagine having worked with anyone else.

Thanks to the professionalisms of Steven Angles and Maritza Moreno-Sanchez at Adler Giersch.  I'm very grateful for there support and strongly recommend if you need an advocate figuring out what your rights are for your health after your accident.

V/r
Fran Whitney

After being involved in a fairly bad car accident, I was searching for a firm that would support me through the process of getting compensated for damages, but treat me as a human being. All of my interactions with Adler Giersch were great, from the first inquiry call to the last settlement conference. Throughout my time working with this firm, Steven Angles and his team were always willing to answer questions, regardless of how small or big. I never felt like I was simply a number and felt genuinely cared for throughout the entire process. I hope to never need an attorney again, but if I do, Adler Giersch will be the first people I call. I highly recommend this firm if you are looking for capable, caring, and compassionate attorneys to help you through the ramifications of a car accident.

Adler Giersch went above and beyond when it came to letting them handle my car accident settlement. We did a lot of leg work on our own, not knowing how difficult it would be to get a response from the insurance company. Our only regret is that we didn't hire them sooner for representation. We were in good hands and it was a pleasure to work with them. They helped direct me to the best professionals for my healing and through the whole process, me getting better was always their main goal. They were a competent team and their history in the area with their connections made them a force to be reckoned with. I appreciate their care for me during this time. It was one less thing we had to worry about.

I am so grateful for the help of Steven Angles and Maritza Moreno-Sanchez at Adler Giersch.  I recommend them as strong and compassionate advocates for us 'regular people'.  Please consider contacting them if you have been hurt: They'll help you figure out what is ethically possible and fight to make it right for you and your health.

If you have a Personal Injury matter, this is the Firm & Attorney you are going to want on your case! Very thorough & knowledgeable! I am very satisfied how they helped me with my Car Accident & getting a max settlement! You can surely trust these guys! Real Talk! :)

Hiring Adler.Giersch to represent me after my car accident was the best decision I made. Steven Angles was the attorney who represented me. Mr. Angles and everyone who worked with him treated me with respect and was very kind from day one. Their first priority was to make sure that I was okay. Steven Angles and Maritza were absolutely wonderful and worked very hard to make sure that my case ended with the best results.

Paula H.

This wasn't an avenue we wanted to pursue, but an amazing team to work with; especially when you don't know the process or legalities of an automobile accident.  Steven and Martiza went above and beyond to explain and walk us though each step, keeping us informed and always with compassion and professionalism. Step by step, they did their homework, interviewing doctors, hospitals, and talking to various insurance companies. We sincerely felt their end goal was not the dollars, but a genuine concern for recovery and achieving the very best for us in the final settlement.

Steve and Maritza gets 5 stars.  They are a great team that helped me with my auto accident. They are very professional, kind and understanding.  They will go out above and beyond to represent you and your case.  That is what they have done for me.  Thank you.

Yes, we highly recommend Steven Angles at Adler Giersch.  My wife and son were, by no fault of their own, in a car accident that changed the direction of our family’s life.  Steven and his staff took us through a difficult journey with maximum professionalism, caring and expert council.  Steven’s skill set is extensive and he managed our expectation in what can be a long process with sage beyond his years.  While some elements of the event will linger, Steven achieved the best possible outcome for our family.   All we can say is well done and give a deep, heartfelt thank you!
Steven Angles at Adler was fantastic my case was long because of my medical problems. I would recommend Steven, he's very thorough, and took great care of me.

Great people to work with.. Steven Angles was amazing in quickly getting my Car Accident settlement.  He was amazing in keeping me informed the entire time. I knew I was dealing with a very competent and Honest attorney.
If you are in need of an attorney that knows his job, Steven is the guy.
I hope I never need representation again, but when I do, he will be the person I call.
Thanks for your persistence and Advice Steven
Ken D

I hired Adler Giersch in 2016 as a result of an auto accident. It is now June 2017 and we have just closed my case. Steven J. Anglés was the attorney on my case and I could not have asked for  more competent, honest, sincere or ethical representation than I received from Steve and his paralegal Maritza. They have been amazing and professional from the beginning and made things much easier for me as I was still dealing with my injuries and surgery.  When they took my case, the first thing they told me was only to worry about and focus on getting healthy and taking care of myself and to leave the worrying about the case to them. They really meant that!!! They took as much time with me as I needed to understand the case, the  process and what it involved (which was very important to me) and never left me without answers, In fact, I never really  needed to call or email them because they kept me in the loop every step of the way. On the few occasions that I did have a question, I was responded to promptly and I really appreciated that.  As far as my settlement, I received far more than I imagined. Steve was definitely MY advocate and he made sure that I received what I deserved as result of my injuries.  Steve and Maritza care about their clients and it shows in the level of service they provide.  I highly recommend Adler Giersch if you are in need of representation. I can't say enough great things about them.
With much gratitude, THANK YOU for your service!

I had the pleasure working with Attorney Steven Anglés and his paralegal Maritza Moreno-Sánchez,  Attorney Melissa Carter and her paralegal Heather Alius, and Carol Fritsch, Intake coordinator.  They were very courteous, compassionate, and professional. I appreciated the fact the handled my case with great care and details every step of the way, while I had focused on healing and recovering. They are definitely the best and I highly recommend them.

I have had years of experience working with chiropractor's and attorney's offices having working in a chiropractor's office for years.  I am so glad I chose Adler Giersch, PS office to handle my PI claim.  Steve Angles and the paralegal Heather were terrific to work with.  I always got an immediate response to any questions I had along the way and recently a very satisfactory resolution to my claim.
Great company, professional staff. Worked with Steve Angles, no regrets a 100% satisfaction. Had an awesome experience with him. If you need a professional lawyer call him!

I  was so impressed with the way Steven Angles of Adler Giersch took on my case with only one year to resolve it. The staff was so helpful with all my concerns and questions. Thank you all for your hard work..I would recommend Adler Giersch to my friends and family in a heartbeat.      Thank you again,      Fran Knight.

I would describe my experience with Adler Giersch as excellent, they were really interested in how I was doing during my recovery, how my recovery could be improved and the long term effects of my injury, the settlement process was well done, I was always kept informed of the process and I am very happy with the outcome

Mr Stephens put in a motion to dismiss in case was dismissed
Couldn’t ask for better results
10 out of 10

Steven’s Law Firm has done such a wonderful job for my wife whose case was denied  by immigration  office due to unfulfilled documents and He prepared all the required documents and they approved within a month. I am highly recommended for people who have immigration case . They are well prepared and well organized . Thanks again Steven !
Brandon and Rolando were professional, kind, and guided me through the process with great care. I’m very grateful for their support!
Very good lawyer and good service. He is the best lawyer. His work is perfect. I would highly recommend his service.

Hey all, I just want to let you guys know that Rolando Castro Stevens Law Firm,PLLC, IS on of the nest. Especially Brandon is excellent in service. He helped my son to adjust his status. He handled all the paperwork from the scratch. He didn't made me to do anything by our self. He is prompt in replying to the messages. I would highly recommend his service if you want to get positive results.

My experience with Stevens Law Firm was nothing short of outstanding! They handled our case with the utmost professionalism and care. Their proactive approach and bold advocacy helped us to achieve a favorable outcome. Exceptional service and results!! I am profoundly grateful for their services!
Incredibly knowledgeable, kind and thorough. Truly appreciate the time I was given. Thank you so much!
reviews.ownerResponse: Shavon, thank you so much for your kind review. Feel free to reach out if you ever need anything in the future.

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. At Stevens Law Firm, PLLC, we value client satisfaction very highly and strive to provide excellent service. Unfortunately, we cannot locate your name in our records. If you intended to leave this review for us, please reach out directly at (425) 671-0033 or via email at brandon@thewalawyer.com, so we may address any concerns you might have. We always aim to resolve any misunderstanding or issues promptly and constructively.

reviews.text: Dont waste your time. Had a call scheduled. Never called. Not even a courtesy email or anything saying Brnadon won't be calling on time and need to reschedule. Super unprofessional.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize for any miscommunication or oversight regarding your scheduled call. At Stevens Law Firm, PLLC, we pride ourselves on being responsive and respectful of our clients' time. We’d appreciate an opportunity to make this right—please contact our office at (425) 671-0033 or email brandon@thewalawyer.com so we can address your experience directly. Your feedback helps us improve our service, and we hope to have the chance to assist you again.

reviews.text: I cannot recommend Brandon Stevens enough. He was professional and knowledgeable. I had spoken with multiple attorneys before consulting with him on my complicated case. He took his time to explain the intricacies of the court system. He was able to navigate each concern with never ending patience and information. He seemed to be well established within the legal community. Relationships he seemed to have fostered helped us in our end goal. He was well worth the money and I was pleased with the outcome of my case.
Immigration process can be difficult, but Stevens Law Firm helped me navigate through it. Thank you for your help.

I had Brandon as my court appointed attorney in an exceptionally difficult and confusing case regarding my eldest daughter. He went above and beyond in my case, even when I was physically unable to be of help he insured that everything was filled and taken care of. In my opinion he is an absolute Hero, he Saved my daughter and for that I will always be thankful to him.

Brandon Stevens is brilliant, dedicated, and compasionate. He understands that those in need of an attorney are dealing with difficult life situations. I could not be more grateful for his counsel, his kindness, his wisdom, and for going above and beyond to see our case through!

I cannot recommend Brandon highly enough! From the moment I reached out for his assistance, he provided exceptional legal guidance and support.  Brandon was responsive, always keeping me informed and updated on the progress of my case.

Thanks to Brandon's diligent efforts and expertise, we achieved a favorable outcome. I am immensely grateful for his representation and would not hesitate to seek his services again in the future.

If you're in need of legal assistance, look no further than Stevens Law Firm.

I had a great experience at Stevens Law Firm, I had inquiry about how to extend our stay after getting laid off. Brandon who is the attorney at Stevens Law Firm, was very helpful and resourceful. He took the time to reach out after my initial email inquiry, describing our situation. Brandon called me the next day, pointing out everything that is necessary, also offered to help us with the filing within a day which was absolutely awesome. He had also provided us a very good rate. Therefore, I highly recommend Brandon, if anyone has immigration related filings or inquiry. After a call with Brandon, he had truly made the process easy to comprehend and broken down the steps along with all the important/necessary documents to provide. This had provided us peace knowing immigration related cases can be complicating.
He,s good and perfect..you can't never Regret been in the office...clever and smart... honest..and reliable..on time .for any appointment....

I Highly recommend going to Steven, from the moment me and my husband walked into his office he was very personable and had great knowledge about our immigration case. We retained him to accompany us at our green card interview. He made sure we were well prepared with all the paperwork. If you have an immigration case be sure to retain him. I got my green card less than a month after the interview.
The  immigration process has been confusing and not a lot people been helpful but he really helped in explaining this process smoothly. Definitely recommend!

Great service!
I would like to say thank you for your help in completing my case smoothly and on time.

First and foremost I want to thank God for leading me to “Steven Brandon “ I want to give a big shout out to Brandon and his professional team for taking a time and listening for what I was considering and my worried about my Green Card and my paperwork for applying for the naturalization” he was so great and highly
Recommended “and understanding the law and take off all my concerns “ and I’m definitely looking forward to be his client’ he’s so patient with me and make the time for me’ I do appreciate it all his hard work “ he’s really top Notch! Wishing him all the best
It was a great experience working with Attorney Brandon Stevens.He is very kind and easy going person with great knowledge in his field. Great service provided , Thankyou for your help!

Absolutely one of the best things that has transpired in 4 decades.

II completely. and honestly recommend his service.
Awesome attorney. Thank you for helping me bring my wife to the U.S. I highly recommend Attorney Stevens.
Brandon is a hard working and caring attorney who will fight for you - courageous, highly intelligent, and caring. Highly recommend for anyone needing a top-notch attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Joseph, thank you for the review. I really appreciate it.

reviews.text:
Dear Atty Brandon:

Me and my wife, really appreciate you great concern on our plight regarding our USCIS visa situation here in the United States.

May God bless you and your thrive increase in helping those in needs of legal services.

Pat and Jenny Marcelo
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Pat. I'm glad I could help you with your immigration issue. Please let me know if I can be of assistance to you in the future.

reviews.text: Working with Atty Brandon Stevens has been a wonderful experience. He is highly professional and compassionate in responding to the needs of his clients. Thank you so much for your great support to my friend's needs.

A special thank you for all your help. We know it’s your job, but it’s vey important for my mother and her life - be a US. Citizen! We would like to express our most sincere thank for your service and all the support, we greatly appreciate it!

reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience and understand how frustrating that must have been.

To clarify, N.N. Mensa is not directly employed by our law firm. They are an independent attorney who occasionally rents office space in our building to meet with their own clients. Our firm does not schedule, manage, or supervise their appointments.

That said, we take our reputation and the experience of anyone visiting our office seriously. We regret that this situation occurred in our space and encourage you to contact the attorney directly regarding the missed appointment.

If you have any questions about our firm or services, we’re happy to assist.

reviews.text:
Our experience with Life Point Law has been extremely stressful and deeply disappointing. Rajiv took advantage of our father during a time when he was under significant distress and highly vulnerable. His conduct was manipulative and, in our view, demonstrates serious ethical concerns regarding his treatment of elderly clients.

During what was supposed to be a consultation, Rajiv persuaded our father to write a check for $20,000 without providing a receipt or clear explanation of services. He also had our father sign a fee agreement — which we did not receive a copy of until nearly a month later, and only after we terminated his services. When we finally obtained the documents, they were filled with errors and appeared unprofessional.

We believe Rajiv’s actions constitute elder exploitation — both emotional and financial — and we hope that others who have had similar experiences will come forward. Accountability is essential so that no other family has to endure this kind of harm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kim, we’re sorry to hear that your experience with our firm was stressful and did not meet your expectations. We understand how important clarity and trust are during an already emotional time, and we regret any confusion or disappointment that may have occurred.

We do strive to have a clear process between us and potential clients from start to finish. Most people begin by attending one of our free public seminars, where we explain our services, philosophy, and pricing in detail. From there, those who wish to meet individually can schedule a two-hour consultation with a Planner.

During that consultation, the attorney reviews any intake materials and documents provided, discusses the person’s situation, and outlines tailored legal options and price points. If the client decides to move forward, the consultation fee is applied toward future services, and a written fee agreement is signed—either as a hard copy in person or digitally through our Portal, which automatically emails a copy to the client.

All documents begin as drafts and are reviewed together in a follow-up appointment to make any needed changes before finalization. This process is designed to ensure accuracy, transparency, and that every client understands their plan.

We regret that this process did not lead to a positive experience in this case, and we will continue working to make communication as clear and supportive as possible.

- The Team at Life Point Law

reviews.text: Attorney Aaron Paker was highly knowledgeable, We met with Attorney Aaron Paker for legal counsel with regards to Veterans Benefits and Medicaid for my Father. Mr. Paker was able to answer all of our questions even though our circumstances were made more complex with VA Hospice in the mix. We would definitely recommend LifePoint Law for any legal counsel with regards to these issues.

Late 2023 we hired and prepaid Life Point Law over $11,000 for doing our life plan, estate documents, and family meeting.

Now early 2025, we are done, BUT only because I have a business background, am tenacious, and had the time to re-view, re-vise, and re-sign, several times...

My advice to you: Read Ragiv's books, get an attorney from an effective office, and forgo the overpriced errors and do-overs.

My advice to Ragiv: Read "Mistakes Were Made (but Not By Me)" by Caroll Tavris and Elliot Aronson.

DETAILS IF YOU WANT THEM----------I totally expected to put in the work to understand legal documents and take action on the life plan. I didn't expect so many issues, errors, and mix ups that originated with Life Point Law. I was surprised each time Ragiv took NO Accountability for even one thing and even implied it was my fault. He called them 'gaffs' in his last email to me.

Not to mention his neglecting to apply the information in the questionnaire we filled out with all our needs. He would say "this won't matter in the end" and "you are taking up too much time." Of course I am when boiler plate given to me needs so much revision because it didn't fit our situation. Also needed to correct names, titles, spelling, and sign three different times due to errors - plus two serious scheduling 'gaffs'.

I held the family meeting myself because when I called to confirm it 5 days prior, was told it was not on Ragiv's schedule with no commitment to get it there. Yet, Ragiv called 30 minutes after the meeting concluded to ask 'where we were?'

There is/was one person on the staff who was amazing and without her this never would have gotten done in the way we wanted it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
It’s tricky for any business to respond to reviews left anonymously, and especially so for a law firm. It’s hard to be certain who the reviewer is or to know for sure if the reviewer was a client. Even if we were certain the reviewer was a client, we would never discuss or debate the details of this case, especially on a public review site.

We can only speculate about what happened to prompt such a negative review. Our goal is to deliver great service in an atmosphere of mutual respect. If a client treats our staff with vitriol or contempt, we may decide that it’s best to stop working with that client. It doesn’t happen very often, but when it does, tempers can flare, and it’s not hard to imagine a disgruntled ex-client writing a scathing review.

In any case, we wish this reviewer the very best.

reviews.text:
Exceptional Legal Expertise and Genuine Care

Aaron Paker, Attorney and Counselor at Law, provided exceptional support in navigating the complex process of transferring property under Medicaid rules. From the beginning, he demonstrated incredible patience and professionalism, offering invaluable advice and tailored support. The fixed-fee structure he provided allowed my cost-conscious brother to receive just the right amount of hands-on assistance, and we truly felt the value far exceeded the cost.

Aaron’s extensive experience was evident as he shared strategic insights that were not widely known but proved invaluable in shaping our approach. These insights gave us peace of mind, especially regarding what banks and outside parties could and couldn’t do, and helped us take a direction we hadn’t initially considered. His knowledge and attention to detail ensured the process was fully compliant with Medicaid requirements and provided us with confidence every step of the way.

Aaron showed genuine care for our family, understanding my brother Jon’s years of caregiving, and was committed to ensuring he received our parents’ wishes and the assets he deserved. His dedication, combined with his legal expertise, made a challenging process far easier to navigate.

Aaron’s professionalism, thoughtfulness, and exceptional value make him a standout attorney. If you’re looking for someone who combines deep legal knowledge with heartfelt care, I highly recommend Aaron Paker.

reviews.text: RUN DO NOT WALK as far away as you can from this place. Went to the "Free Seminar" in Bellevue. The place where the seminar is held, they charge for parking. Was not told this in advance. The place will only accept credit cards to pay for the parking. It cost $16.00 to park on a Saturday. Then after the seminar, they want $350.00 to make an appointment. This supposedly will give a discount for the appointment. Once the $350.00 is paid, you are handed a packet that needs to be filled out by the time of the appointment. which is fine, but then at the appointment, they want ALL of the rest of the monies, depending on which package you choose. The cheapest is $6,900.00, then next is $12,950.00 and the last is $17,500.00. Also on the cover letter of the packet, there are 3 other locations listed. When asked about that at the appointment, they acted like they did not know that that paper is still being used. Also made them aware of having to pay for parking. Was told that they were not going to use that place in Bellevue again. YET... got an email today listing the next "Free Seminars", and the Bellevue location is still listed!!!!! At the time of your appointment, if you can't pay the whole amount they will pressure you into paying what ever you can and then pay the rest at the next appointment. Thank goodness to some very good sound advice from some very good friends, am no longer going to do business with this company. Like the friend said, if they are having to hold seminars to get clients, there is something WRONG!!!!!! Wish I had read the reviews before I went to the seminar.

My husband and I are 64 yrs young. I started listening to Ragiv on the radio driving to work. I have a large extended family and all his information was so spot on I felt a lifeline thrown out to help myself and my children manage our future care and wellbeing.
The cost, I thought was out of my ability to afford but from his examples I understood that although I’m not wealthy I needed his help. Thru his seminar I went forward. I met with Ragiv, life changer! He is a gracious man sincerely interested in advising my family with the goal of lessening confusion as to how to manage the 10-20 yrs that we’ll navigate next.
It is a very comprehensive process, so be prepared to be involved. It is about you, your family not his business. As we complete the process the response from both my adult children and my husbands’ children is they are so grateful that we have made this investment of time to love them enough to help them know how to take care when decisions need to be made, often unexpectedly. It has been so comforting for the whole family. The kids know we are doing our best to make sure Mom & Dad are cared for and we have done what we could so our children and their family’s lives are not impacted in an unmanageable way.
I highly recommend this business; Aging Options really does provide positive options that you decide.

reviews.text:
I was fortunate to have met Rajiv after going through a very difficult time in my life dealing with divorce and a cancer diagnosis.  Rajiv was able to be honest with me and tell me exactly where I was financially as he proceeded to lay out the options I had to secure my future and to have my retirement look the way I wanted it to look.  Rajiv’s approach was unique in that he took the time to really hear, and listen to what I wanted and needed and yet kindly and gently let me know when what I wanted didn’t line up with my financial situation.  Through his expert guidance I set out in a direction that, at 69 years old now, I am happy very with.  If we had not met, I’m sure I would have gone in another direction and things would be very difficult for me right now.

Rajiv encouraged me to get the family involved with my plans from the beginning because, after all, “aging is a family affair”.  No other person had stressed this.  I look back now and I am so very grateful that I began that early.  I am fortunate to have a wonderful son and daughter that have agreed to be involved.   Including them, every step of the way from the beginning, has allowed both my children to grow and learn so much.  This whole process has brought the whole family closer together, I am so very grateful.

I have entered my retirement years feeling that I have done my best to plan and prepare for the unpredictable events that life can throw at you.  My children are educated and onboard knowing exactly what Mom’s wishes are.  If they forget, they know to look for the brown notebook that contains everything and if they have further questions, they can consult Rajiv.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sylvia, we love hearing this. Helping you create a more predictable future is what we are all about. Thank you for allowing us to serve you!

reviews.text: Rajiv Nagaich and Life Point Law are the best!  Rajiv and his associates helped my father plan for his care (in the hopefully unlikely event,) that he becomes disabled or needs rehab.  My fathers wishes will be shared with the family ahead of time (care at home!) and it will lessen the stress and burden on the family.  Thank you Rajiv and Life Point Law!

I was unaware of the financial ramifications and choices available as you manage changes and create a plan of instructions for your family or trustee to follow.  Rajiv introduced the ides of finding a Geriatric doctor, as well as what to consider if you want to age in place at home; how to prepare to the extent possible. reviews.text:
With the help of Life Point Law we just got approval of Medicaid Benefits for my 86 yr old father-in law, who needed help transitioning from home to a Senior Living Facility with skilled nursing care.  After initially attending one of Rajiv Nagaich’s seminars on elder care planning we could see immediately that Rajiv understood the special needs of a senior family member and the issues of care, paying for care, and protecting ones assets.  We learned about how they could help us find the right place for the needed care and that Medicaid could help pay for it and protect the family assets.

The process can be complicated and emotional with lots of moving parts.  Once we got started we worked with staff attorney, Aaron Paker who guided us through all the details of getting ready to and actually applying for Medicaid.  It took a while to get done but we are grateful to Aaron and his team for all the effort that went into it.

My father in law is now getting the care he needs in a setting he likes.  His wife has moved into an independent living apartment that she likes as well in an adjoining building at the same facility.  This allows them to visit daily.

For the first time in many years we as a family can start to feel like our parents are cared for and their assets won’t be used to pay for specialized care until they run out of money.  We are very grateful to Aaron Paker, Rajiv Nagaich, and the rest of the team at Life Point Law.  We know we would not have done this without them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Bill.

The result is that we now feel that we have a life plan that maps out our financial, healthcare, housing and legal future. Because of the family meeting that Rajiv led with our adult children, there are no taboo areas that cannot be discussed.

My husband and I both feel a connection with Rajiv, and his empathy and understanding with our unique challenges was life changing! We are so happy that we are on this journey with someone as knowledgeable and passionate as Rajiv.

reviews.text: This was the worst $50,000.00 I ever spent.  I hired Brad based on his word and got a sex offender attorney who was a nice guy but wasnt who i hired.  Brad said he could win the case and then told me to take a plea deal and then made me sign a paper stating that I was going against the advise of an attorney.  I want my money back and I will take this down otherwise you reep what you sow.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry that you feel this way, I know this office worked extremely hard on your case. When you came to this office, you were facing several very serious charges, with the most serious being "Assault 1st Degree with a Deadly Weapon" (on a police officer). You were alleged to have bludgeoned a police officer in the head, with a heavy duty metal flashlight, and the incident was caught on video. This resulted in the officer having serious injuries, to include a traumatic brain injury. You were facing approximately 172 months in prison.

As we worked on your case for over a year, we were able to negotiate a substantially reduced plea offer that required no jail time, no probation, and the ability to have it removed from your record after a period of 5 years.

You are correct you were advised that this was an extremely good offer based on what you would have risked at trial, however you declined that offer and we proceeded to trial as requested. After picking a jury, you got cold feet and begged us to try and get the same plea deal back.

At that time we renegotiated with the prosecutor, and got you almost the same deal, which most importantly still avoided jail time. I wish you the best of luck moving forward.

reviews.text:
This is my first review of an attorney. In fact, this is my first time hiring an attorney. I worked with Anthony Grasher. A couple of months ago I found myself needing to get a protection order due to an unstable neighbor. What should have been an open and shut case turned into 2 cases that were more complex than I ever thought they would be. What I went through, I wouldn't wish on anybody. However, if you are reading this review it is likely you are in a similar position. Let me tell you why I am happy that I ended up with Anthony as my attorney.

At first, I was surprised by the price tag, but it was a flat fee. As this case went on, ultimately that was the best decision. As with any professional relationship, you have expectations for the person you are hiring, and you want to do what you can to make their job easier. I will say that Anthony not only met my expectations on a professional level but he more than exceeded my expectations on a personal level. After a few conversations with Anthony and particularly one difficult conversation while we were waiting for the judge to return with her decision, I not only saw but truly felt the genuine humanity and concern that Anthony has for his clients, in this case me. At that point, even had I lost one or both cases, which I did not, we won both, I knew without a doubt I made the right decision with Anthony. I hope I never need another lawyer that specializes in Protection Orders again but if I do there is no question who I will be calling. Anthony is very passionate about what he does but it's obviously not just for his win loss record (if that is actually a thing) but Anthony is a genuinely good human being that genuinely cares about his clients.

This is price gouging for services I never got and never received a call from them. Unless you plan to file I wouldn’t give this place your service, the communication was horrible. reviews.text:
First, I want to acknowledge that Iddins Law Group provides professional legal services, and their staff are friendly and pleasant to work with. However, my experience with their consultation process was disappointing and lacked transparency.

I am leaving a one-star review due to my experience with their consultation process. While comparing rates among several law firms for drafting a will and revocable living trust, this was the only firm that charged a consultation fee. Unfortunately, this was not clearly communicated at the time of booking. There was no prominent disclosure of the fee during scheduling, nor was a credit card deposit required, which would have made the charge more transparent.

I was billed $250 for a 1.5-hour consultation. Additionally, the booking did not clearly indicate that the meeting was in person, which led to confusion and required me to call the office after the scheduled time. During my conversation with the representative, the consultation fee was not mentioned either before or after the meeting.

I found this lack of transparency concerning, especially since the consultation fee is applied toward services only if you move forward with the firm. For those who are still comparing options, this can be an unexpected expense.

For reference, I obtained quotes from five other law firms, and Iddins Law Group’s pricing was the highest among them. I strongly encourage prospective clients to clarify consultation fees and overall costs before scheduling.

Clear communication around pricing is a basic expectation, and unfortunately, that was not met here. I hope the firm will consider making its consultation policies more clearly stated upfront to avoid similar misunderstandings in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for recognizing the strengths of our team. We take pride in our commitment to delivering exceptional legal representation to our clients.

Our consultations have never been free; however, we offer complimentary 15-minute phone calls for new clients to introduce our estate planning attorneys, discuss their needs, and provide a fee estimate, with no obligation to retain our services.

This complimentary call policy is clearly communicated on our website, in the flat fee flyers sent to all prospective estate planning clients, and mentioned during initial phone conversations.

The $250.00 consultation fee is credited toward any flat rate documents purchased at the time of consultation, reflecting a fair and reasonable approach.

Our flat rates for Estate Planning documents are transparent, published on our website, and are based on the extensive knowledge provided to clients and the time and effort our legal team dedicates to each case.

These practices ensure clarity and fairness for our clients while upholding the high standards of service our team is known for.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi David,

We have no record of you as a client, and you appear to be a third party who was not present at any consultations or legal discussions with our office. It is unclear how you can make statements about what was explained during private and confidential legal meetings.

Your review reflects a misunderstanding of SIJS law. Special Immigrant Juvenile Status is granted only after a state court determines that reunification with one or both parents is not viable due to abuse, neglect, abandonment, or a similar legal basis under state law. It does not create a prohibition on communication with parents. The primary statutory limitation is that a beneficiary generally cannot later petition for a parent for immigration purposes.

Any decision regarding admission to the United States is made by federal immigration authorities based on the specific facts of an individual case and applicable law. Such determinations are made by the government, not by our office.

We remain committed to providing accurate legal guidance in accordance with federal and state law. We take inaccurate public statements seriously and address them through the appropriate channels.

reviews.text: Thank you, it's a powerful company. They gave me status. Everything is clear. They invest.

Good evening. First, I want to say that I have been a child of God since I opened my eyes to the earthly world. I had a school education where I suffered a lot. I needed extra help in almost every subject. And once, I think when I was about eight years old, I asked an electronics technician, a graduate of the Luis Bográn Technical Institute in Tegucigalpa, the capital of Honduras, to help me solve a math problem. It was so difficult for me; I couldn't understand it. As the years went by, my understanding of the problem grew more and more difficult. I improved in school, I think, to very good, I noticed it... And at the La Paz Normal School I had grades of 80, a very good result. But as a believer in God, well, my dad, Francisco Lizardo Rivera, was mayor of Cane many years ago, he asked me if I wanted to travel by car or bicycle. I hardly thought about it, I told him by bicycle. I think one year I traveled at midday, around 11 o'clock or a few minutes past, leaving for La Paz on a bicycle. Well, then they completely changed the schedule. I don't remember when classes started, but I left in the morning. I went to the Guillermo Suazo Cordova Normal School. Of course, it was co-ed. I think I traveled there for two years, and the other years by bus, I think. Mr. Illumino studied a lot until 3 in the morning. I remember my dad telling me to go to bed because it was very late, because he was going to milk the cows, if I remember correctly. Now I reflect that by making an effort, the Lord helps, our redeemer who is Jesus Christ. There are two more examples. The late Mr. Lorenzo Cervantes traveled to Tegucigalpa to study to become a doctor. On horseback from La Paz... And I admire Brother Machuca, who knew eight languages. The one who told me that story makes me very scared and sad because I think he was killed with stones inside the Sunday classes of a church. I helped him a little; I sat with him in the front. I believe this to be true, and much more. A laboratory where, according to historical works, families create an open password account on the Nia page. I created a member; he showed it to me. It's very late. Then I continued.

When you feel like your life couldn't get worse because of your accident but you really are just hoping it would? Then this is your law office. The accident was not my fault, but my "lawyer" was not able to get the other driver to assume responsibility, even with my testimony, multiple police officers testimonies, a police report AND witnesses saying it was very clearly the other drivers fault. The rental company did send what I owed to a collections agency because I had not paid it, but I had been told that the lawyer here at this law office would take care of these things so I could focus on recovering. I also ended up having to pay my insurance company's deductible ($500) in order to get my car looked at because the incompetent lawyers working here couldn't get the at fault driver's insurance company to estimate my car. All in all, hiring these lawyers has caused me pain and suffering, and a couple thousand dollars.
