reviews.text: Pathetic law firm full of liars. If they have any doubt they could win the lawsuit they will reject you as a client. The first time I reached out to them they were available to taking on new clients. They wanted me to submit some of my medical malpractice proof which I spent hours doing, they then lied to me and said they didn’t have the time for new cases and they were so busy with other lawsuits for the next several years. It’s been a year now and I called them other day and asked if they were accepting new clients and she said YES! I then shared who I was and then came on the lies. She claims that she worded things incorrectly and they do not have any openings to accept new clients. Pretty much they are not skilled enough to take on cases that require a lot of time and work. They claim to have won lawsuits for millions and millions of dollars. I call bullshit on the pathetic law firm of Swanson Gardner Meyers.
good service
Great

After an accident which wasn’t my fault we sought help from a law firm.  The first few contacted did not appeal.  However, when we contacted Swanson+Gardner+Meyers we were impressed.  After a conversation with Mr. Meyers we were convinced and set up an in person appointment.  This proved pivotal in our year long relationship.  They have always been there for us giving the needed timely advice and followup.  Most of the personal contact was with Jennifer but both Mr. Meyers and Mr. Gardner where available when needed.  There help was very helpful in my recovery.  We would recommend anyone needing legal advice contact them.

Todd Gardner and his paralegal Jennifer Holcomb gave our family help and guidance through a terrible year 2020.Our husband and father was hit by a parking car into a concrete retaining wall, causing traumatic injury to the lower half of his body. Having never encountered a situation like this, their counsel and dealing with medical bills and insurance agents eased our way through all the unfamiliar details that burdened us. Over months of operations, physical therapy and recuperating in a nursing facility, the team soothed our fears and gave us hope. Always returning calls promptly and making us feel cared for by their interest in Bob's progress and amazing steps of recovery.They also negotiated a very good settlement for us.We are so very grateful to them and would highly recommend Mr. Gardner and his group to anyone needing assistance with a personal injury case.

Bob and family
Best lawfirm

Peter and his team came in and took care of me when I was at my lowest. I had hurt my back (two surgeries) in a car accident. The pain had affected my work, relationships, mood, and general desire for life. They walked me through the whole process and followed through on everything they said they would do. I would write them a question via email at 2pm on a Saturday, and by 4:30 I’d have a response. They cared when it felt like me and my family were the only ones who did. They were able to secure me a maximum settlement from the insurance company, and made me feel like I could move on from all of this. They have earned my future referrals.

Special thank you to Jennifer, paralegal on my case, for her thorough, prompt, and caring responses.
Great law firm with staff that listens and truly cares about their clients.

I cannot recommend this firm enough. Peter Meyers represented my recent case which resulted in what I believe to be the highest settlement amount possible. He professionally explained the decisions I was faced with throughout each phase, and guided me with his expertise in a non-rushed or aggressive way. I do not think I would have had such a good outcome in my case had it not been for Peter. Jennifer was also an incredible asset throughout the entire process. I had the most contact with her, oftentimes daily, for much of the past three years. Her patience with my questions seemed to have no cap, and her compassion unmatched. She is knowledgeable, professional, consistent, caring, and responsive. Between Peter and Jennifer, I truly felt I had the best team possible representing me and highly recommend Swanson Gardener Meyers.
Absolutely amazing people. Truly - Todd Gardner helped us immensely.

Peter Meyers helped my husband and me when we were going through a very tough time. He was kind, fair, very reasonably priced,  and above all - someone we felt very comfortable with. He is a person of high integrity, and we recommend him without hesitation.

Peter Meyers and Swanson Gardner Meyers have helped me on a few legal issues and they are terrific.  Cost effective, practical, objective advice. They genuinely care for their clients and I cannot highly recommend them enough to anyone needing a personal injury attorney.

I’ve known and worked with Pete for over 10 years. Tackling legal issues can be challenging and stressful, and Pete always puts me at ease. He’s very knowledgeable of a wide variety of legal subjects, has strong ethical standards, and proactively communicates with me. I strongly recommend Pete for anyone seeking legal advice.
I worked with Peter Meyers. He was very responsive and took great care in understanding all of my concerns. Would recommend.

Scam!! Alesha should not touch family law with a 10ft pole! She is lackluster,  zero initiative, uncaring, lazy to a T, unprofessional, the list goes on..  Don't be fooled, she seems great at first, then her true colors manifest. Backstory: I don't know the legal system to save my life, I needed a champ in my corner, a fighter. It's been 2 years since I've seen my son (custody battle). At every turn, while I think things are happening behind the scenes on my behalf, Alesha hasn't lifted a finger. My son's mom, with no legal training, has been continously mopping the floor with her. Watching my case, especially for so long, and just being ok with keeping it "on the backburner" status, it's just inhuman! Im confident any other lawyer, I'd of had my son back a year ago. She charges the same, which is to be expected, but I've missed the 2nd and 3rd year of my son's life. It's the time I can't afford, I'll never get that back. I hope to spare the next victim from crossing her path

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the feedback, Sean. I’m sorry to hear that you felt that your time was wasted. When someone makes a consultation, we instruct them to fill out the new client questionnaire. We require that the questionnaire is completed prior to the consultation and emailed to three individuals. Our process is if people make an appointment and don’t send the required forms and documents, we cancel or reschedule the appointment. We hope you can find other legal counsel to assist you with your case. – Alesha Struthers (Owner)

Wow great job Vinny does my father came with  a great outcome highly recommend him thank you Vinny

In my case with the seat belt, they were able to prove my innocence and restore justice. Thanks to their work, my record stayed clean. I am very grateful and highly recommend their services!
Attorney Vinny Randhawa was professional, responsive, and got results. Clear communication and strong representation — highly recommend
thanks Mr. Randhawa! and Elaine she very helpful

Hello,
I sincerely thank you and your team for helping me. You accomplished something impossible for me. Choosing your team was the best choice, and it will never be forgotten. Thank you.
He was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and made the whole process smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend him for anyone in need of a reliable attorney.
I would give 10 stars if possible

I had an excellent experience working with Van Siclen Stocks Firkins on my personal injury case. My attorney, Dexter, was outstanding from start to finish. He was knowledgeable, direct, and always made sure I understood what was happening and why. I never felt rushed or left in the dark, which matters a lot in a stressful situation like this.

The paralegal, Skye, was also fantastic. He was responsive, organized, and incredibly helpful throughout the entire process. Communication was clear and timely, and any questions I had were handled quickly and professionally.

Overall, the team was thorough, attentive, and genuinely invested in getting a strong result for me. I’m very grateful for their work and would confidently recommend Van Siclen Stocks Firkins, Dexter, and Skye to anyone needing reliable and effective personal injury representation.

Wonderful experience I want to thank Jeff and Sky for getting my settlement done before the holidays and always answering any question I had very quickly. Will be referring all my friends to you guys.

John Stocks is direct and honest — he tells you what you need to hear and has your best interests at heart. He’s very knowledgeable in family law and takes the time to explain things clearly and realistically.

He’s also easy to reach, responsive, and very thorough. He held the opposing counsel accountable when incorrect legal information was being presented — a testament to his command of family law and commitment to his clients.

Behind his straightforward approach, he’s genuinely kind and helpful. If you want someone who knows family law inside and out and will advocate for you until the end, I highly recommend John Stocks and his firm, Van Siclen Stocks & Firkins.

I would like to share my experience in securing legal representation for my personal employment case, an endeavor that proved quite challenging, especially in identifying an attorney who instilled a sense of trust and understanding. As a woman of color, I initially questioned whether it was essential to have representation that mirrored my identity to truly comprehend and empathize with the profound trauma I experienced throughout the two and a half years it took to settle the case. This aspect was a significant factor in my search for the right legal partner. I hope this insight into the complexities and emotional labor involved in this search may be helpful for others facing similar situations.

I ultimately chose to work with Jeffrey Musto and his paralegal, Sky Park. I am pleased to convey that my initial concerns about not having a person of color represent me quickly dissipated. They both invested considerable time in understanding my individual circumstances, demonstrating a profound grasp of my case and the desired outcome. While I acknowledge that I can be a very demanding client, their performance was exceptional.

Should you be seeking a legal team, I highly recommend considering their firm and advise against allowing preconceived notions or stereotypes to influence your decision, particularly if you are a person of color.
Pennie assisted me by suggesting I contact vital records in Olympia Washington in regards to my birth certificate.  I believe she's saved me a lot of $$. Thank you Pennie

I had a perfect experience with VSSF. Mr. John Stocks and his team—Emma and Dexter—did an excellent job on my case. Mr. Stocks was professional, responsible, and truly took care of my situation, pulling me out of a difficult time. It might have been a routine matter for them, but it meant a great deal to me.
Emma was always prompt and patient in her responses, which I deeply appreciated. Thank you all for your hard work! I’m so happy and grateful. I wish VSSF continued success and hope they can help many more people in the future.
They did an amazing job representing me in court. I am so happy I won. I would highly recommend them for legal advice and representation.

I am very disappointed with this firm. It took several emails, texts and phone calls to even have someone contact me back. I finally was able to set up a consultation, and when Mr. Firkins called, the paralegal had given me the incorrect time so I was left feeling scattered and unprepared. I was told by the paralegal that Mr. Firkins would only call if he felt there was a case, but when I spoke with him, I felt like I was being talked down to and wasting his time. Not impressed.

Unfortunately, my experience with John Stocks was disappointing. I didn't feel properly supported or heard, and communication was often unclear. His impatience in listening, combined with an aggressive and dismissive attitude toward my requests, made an already unprofessional process even more stressful. I do not recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: We understand you were dissatisfied with your free consultation. No attorney-client relationship was established, yet we provided our time in good faith to explain options and discuss next steps. Our firm is committed to professionalism, clear communication, and respectful service, and we wish you the best.

reviews.text:
Van Siclen Stocks & Firkins great team of attorneys!
Worked with John Stocks and he is highly professional, knowledgeable, and dependable. He’s well-regarded for his integrity and commitment to his clients. I confidently recommend him to anyone in need of legal support.

P.s. They have best the paralegal team and front desk.

This attorney actually disclosed information to another attorney to harm me, and this firm withheld my judgement from me for more than a year and left me to handle getting it back from VSF who kept my settlement money!!!!! CAUTION WITH THIS FIRM

Did a consultation with Jeffrey Musto, he asked me to gather documents and I spent time doing that. I sent it to him and he never got back to me. I followed up several times and never heard back! Very unprofessional! I don't recommend him or this firm.

I’ve known John Stocks for years and can confidently say he’s one of the most dedicated, sharp, and compassionate professionals I know. His integrity, attention to detail, and commitment to his clients’ best interests truly stand out. If I ever needed a family attorney, I’d trust him without hesitation. Highly recommended!

I give John Stocks and his team a five-star review. As a fellow attorney in the community, I have consulted with John on several occasions for legal advice and perspective. He is knowledgeable, thoughtful, and professional in his approach. I appreciate his willingness to share his insights and recommend him and his firm to those looking for reliable legal support.

My EAP refered me to this law group and after less than 5 minutes of speaking with the receptionist and her playing the go between for myself and the attorney they refused me the consiltation I was entitled to.  The bottom line is they decide in minutes what they think will bring in the big bucks for them and what won't and see anyone else as not worth their time.  Do not consider them if you are looking for compassion and a personal touch.

I hired this firm in order to handle the legal part in dealing with an auto accident in October of 2023. I made this decision as they have done very good work on a previous legal matter for me. As it has turned out, Jenna and her team have exceeded my expectations for the outcome. I have much gratitude for this firm and to those who work there.
Rodney Claus

I can’t thank Tyler Firkins enough for his outstanding representation. He stood by me when I was facing bullying tactics from my previous employer and made sure my voice was heard. Tyler was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly supportive throughout the entire process. His strategic approach and strong advocacy helped me secure the best possible outcome. If you’re looking for a lawyer who truly has your back and will fight for your rights, Tyler is the one you want.

I was in a car accident with my wife and daughter, and we didn’t know what to do. This law firm made everything so much easier. I mostly talked to the paralegal, who was very helpful and made sure everything was done right. The attorney also replied really fast whenever we had questions, which was a big help. They were always there when we needed them and responded quickly. They also speak Korean, which is great for anyone who feels more comfortable with it. They were professional, quick, and really cared about us. If anything like this happens again, I would definitely come back. I highly recommend this firm to anyone in Washington—it’s a place you can trust!

I had an excellent experience working with VSSF.  They handled my case with professionalism, expertise, and care. Communication was always clear and timely, keeping me informed every step of the way. Thanks to their dedication, mediation resulted in a positive outcome, and I couldn’t be more grateful. I highly recommend Deborah and her Paralegal Leah to anyone in need of a knowledgeable and reliable attorney!

This firm challenged an insurance company's offer for my totaled car and came away with a much larger settlement than I could have hoped for.  I had pretty much given up, but Van Siclen, Stocks and Firkins' tenacity definitely paid off.  Thank you for the wonderful and unexpected outcome!

My husband and I worked with Tyler and Sky for our MVA and they are the best! Tyler went above and beyond for us and I could not recommend them more. We were very happy with our results. They were always more than happy to answer questions and help in anyway they could.

Things were questionable but I think overall the representation from this firm was OK. It did take over $50K to get them to see that I was telling them the truth. This is a clear example of you being guilty of whatever until proven innocent. Most people do not have the resources to prove their innocence. My issue was not until the end, there was a mistake with the Judgment where a simple fix could happen and then nothing. I understand that we are in the holidays and actions would be slow but the last time that I checked, communication was fast. If you have deadlines, with this firm they may or may not be met.

I had questions about an automobile accident that I was in.  The lady I spoke with was very kind and took the time to answer questions I had in regards to this incident.  I feel more comfortable about my situation and know that if I ever do need an attorney in the future I would definitely contact these people.

Going through a divorce, whilst separating from an unhealthy and confusing relationship is without a doubt one of the most painful experiences I’ve been through - emotional, confusing, and exhausting.  Advice to anyone going through it - get professional help, do not try to DIY this.  There’s too much complexity.

Deborah Gordon and her team were a perfect fit for me.  I am highly, highly detail oriented and rather obsessive about getting everything right.  Throw the emotion of a divorce into that and it’s enormously stressful.  Deborah was stable and straight forward with her communication - clear and simple.  She also balanced this with a strong degree of empathy along the way.  There were times when I was clearly going around in circles in my head.  She recognized this and was always able to provide clarity and calmness, so that we could move forward.

She gave no nonsense advice and pushed me to advocate for myself, when I probably would have failed to do so alone.  She had my back.

Thank you Deborah

Never replied in an accessible manner to a disabled person.

Followed up because they never replied. Was told by Tyler Firkins "You have the right to remain silent"
Direct copy paste. They are now in violation of ADA title 3 for harassment.

Still not understanding what the communication needs of the neurodevelopmentally disabled are.

Maybe I should go ahead with reporting a civil rights violation to the city as I spoke with them via email over. I was letting it go, but you don't seem to understand that Tyler ignored my voice, got a bad review then threatened me.

Civil Rights violations due to ignorance is still a civil rights violation.

Last chance, you have my email and have been told repeatedly to contact me.

As you can see, nothing but lies. They denied accommodations and failed to redress those failures long before they denied me service due to my disability. Same as the ACLU for a good reason, both are utterly useless and will blame the disabled for their own communication failures and barriers to access due to following policies.

Worked great at Nuremberg. I was leaving you out of the ongoing idiocy loop of DOJ failures. But I will update this with your personal DOJ case number soon. You just earned it.
reviews.ownerResponse: We have not consulted with Ben Sabelhaus, nor have we agreed to accept his case.  We often are unable to take on every case that comes through an unsolicited email.  So, now, this is a non-client, who has now given us two one star reviews.  He has give one star reviews to the ACLU and other law firms as well.

reviews.text: Deborah Gordon did a libelous work on my name . She then ducked my charges on her licensure  The end.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We reviewed this and have no record of any client, matter, complaint, or licensing issue involving this name or the allegations described.

Deborah Gordon practices in Auburn, Washington, and we are not aware of any connection to the reviewer, who appears to be located in South Carolina. Licensing matters are state-specific, and nothing referenced here corresponds to our practice or jurisdiction.

We believe this review may be intended for a different individual or business. If the reviewer believes there is a legitimate connection, we invite them to contact us directly so we can clarify.

We remain committed to transparency and accurate information for the public.

reviews.text: Before I found Van Siclen Law I used two other Attorneys that failed to help me get what I deserved from my auto wreck. reviews.text:
Dexter, Kristie, and the entire team at VSSF were exceptional! When I initially reached out, I was in a challenging situation, having very little time to respond after being served. Dexter not only calmed my nerves but also provided invaluable advice and swiftly got me organized. This calming and supportive approach persisted throughout the entire process, with both Dexter and Kristie. Despite the strength of my emotions, Dexter consistently presented options and likely outcomes based on his professional expertise. I had to go against my instincts several times, and each time, the counsel I received from Dexter proved to be immensely beneficial.

I must highlight Kristie's role as well. She made me feel heard during one of the toughest times in my life. I am genuinely pleased with the outcome of my case. I believe the relationship with my ex-wife is in a much better place compared to where it was just a year ago when this journey began. Dexter's guidance prevented me from making potential mistakes, resulting in my family being in good shape, a highly satisfactory parenting plan, and, most importantly, my 10-year-old son being in a stable, warm, and caring environment from both his mother and father. I wholeheartedly recommend this team.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is great news.  We love hearing about a positive experience, especially in situations that can be challenging, not only emotionally or financially, but legally.  I trust that if you ever find yourself - or a friend/family - in a legal entanglement of any sort, that you would turn to us for advice!  Thanks again.

reviews.text: John Stocks was extremely professional,  encouraging,  and helpful and walked with me step by step in my case. His honesty and sincerity was exactly what I needed. I have and will continue to recommend John Stocks and his firm to people who are in need of legal help.

reviews.text: When my wife was injured in a collision and the insurance companies didn’t want to meet their obligations, we turned to Tyler Firkins. Tyler is a strong advocate, and I knew from previous experience that he is tough, smart, and determined. He went to work, marshalling the skills of a top outside medical expert, and applied the necessary pressure and negotiations expertise to get impressive results from both insurers. The settlements exceeded our expectations, and we were more than pleased with Tyler’s work! We highly recommend Tyler Firkins and would not hesitate to utilize his services if we need legal representation in the future.
Very good
Professional group of very hard working men & women🙂

When I first reached out to Lutz & Associates, I was seeking legal counsel regarding what I believed might become a high-conflict divorce. Instead of immediately encouraging me to retain them, they gave me honest advice: save my money and pursue a protection order first to establish safety and stability.

That level of integrity immediately stood out. They were the first legal team that truly listened to my situation and prioritized my well-being over securing a retainer. Because of that, I ultimately chose to retain Kallie anyway—and I’m so glad I did.

I’m incredibly grateful for the guidance and professionalism of this team. I will absolutely continue working with Lutz & Associates for any family court matters moving forward and would highly recommend them to anyone navigating a difficult or high-conflict family situation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your thoughtful review, Nicole! We're glad to hear attorney Kallie Ferguson provided the honesty and support you needed during such a challenging time. Clients deserve to be heard and receive legal advice that is tailored to their specific needs. We appreciate your recommendation!

Laura and Amanda were the absolute best to work with. They’ve helped my family so much and made the process so easy. Especially Kylie she was always polite and professional.

My team was so incredible and I’m so thankful for everything they’ve done for me!

reviews.text:
Highly recommend!
I’m just beginning my case and wasn’t sure which direction to take, but calling Lutz & Associates was the best first step I could’ve made. I spoke with Jasmine, who was not only professional and knowledgeable, but also incredibly kind and easy to talk to. She offered helpful advice that gave me clarity and reassurance. Thank you for making the start of a tough process feel manageable and less overwhelming!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Katy! We're ecstatic to hear that Jasmine provided you with the guidance and clarity you needed.  Helping people is our passion and our priority.  Wherever clients are in their legal process, we are here to help!

reviews.text: Mr,Andrew and Jasmine were the best ,they had alot of patience when the court pressured us and they calmed me down and gave me assurance that things will be fine and indeed my  case was a great success .Kudos team
reviews.ownerResponse: That is exactly what we are here for!  Many thanks for your sparkling review!  Our team knows how to get results while still helping clients get through tumultuous and stressful times in their lives.  When you win, we win, and we are happy to have been a part of your legal success.

reviews.text:
I am now in my 3rd year of working with Attorney Andrew Voelker at Lutz and I could not feel more fortunate.
I can sleep soundly at night knowing Andrew has had my complicated and never-ending case from you know where. To abbreviate some of the matters he has navigated for me for reference; a Protection Order, Restraining Order including minors, a divorce that included domestic violence and extreme property damage to the home, all while the ex was in the process of being criminally prosecuted (found guilty) and relentlessly pursuing vindictive measures against me, and posting his jail bond to the title of my home, amongst more...Needless to say, it has been like a Squid Game version of whack-a-mole with this case and Andrew has been present and proactive at every turn to get me and my family through it safely.

Besides having a really great personality that is easy to get along and work with, he is dedicated, thorough, responsive, compassionate and does an absolutely outstanding job. He is a true professional, and an asset to his field. I couldn't recommend him more.

Andrew is an unsung hero in my life!
reviews.ownerResponse: Nicole, thank you for your wonderful review! We’re thrilled to hear how much you appreciate Andrew's tireless dedication and support during such a challenging time. Your words inspire us to continue providing exceptional service. We're grateful to have you as part of our community!

reviews.text:
I have worked with Ms Morfitt of Lutz Law on a number of times on cases where she is counsel for 1 party and I'm the realtor helping sell the home.  Each time we've worked together, I've been impressed!

What I find most impressive is how she is able to explain the situation to her client in a way that evokes logic and fairness rather than ruffled feathers.

On more than 1 occasion, the opposing party have told me the wish they had retianed and used Ms Morfitt as their attorney.  That speaks volumes to her professionalism, throughness and williness to find a fair solution to a hard set of problems.

Bottom line, I highly recommend her!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the vote of confidence, Zach!  It matters to us, and the firm and attorney Morfitt appreciate it!

reviews.text: It is hard to put into words all the gratitude that I have for my Attorney Kelsey Morfit and all the staff at Lutz Law. After being married for 30+ years my divorce has been an ongoing harrowing experience. Kelsey is always there to answer my questions and spell out all my options. Always keeping in mind my goal and keeping me on track through this process. You need someone who is able to stay on top of all that is thrown at you during this time. Lutz Law and Associates is absolutely fantastic.

reviews.text: David 100% cares for the outcome to be in best interest of his clients . David showed us that he gets to the point , doesn’t mess with unexplained costs ( he works hard for every dime without wasting the clients money ), he keeps us in the loop 24/7 or any changes or possible problems. If you’re looking for an attorney that fights unconditionally and with passion for the right outcome then David is the man . If you’re looking to destroy someone else’s life through court than know that David will still prevail with a honest outcome and what is best for his client . David works very passionate with what you give him and will tell you the truth is it’s worth mediating or fighting . Honestly , I will continue to have him as our attorney even after family court is settled . David’s ability has no bounds for the rightful settlement that he has done for us so we are forever grateful for a professional help . I recommend him to fellow veterans as well .

Your satisfaction is our motivation, and we’re here whenever you need us. Thank you for your loyalty!

reviews.text: Kelsey Morfitt represented me and helped lead me to successfully being granted to relocate with my child. I was able to communicate with her easily through email, phone and in person. All questions and concerns I had were responded to and answered quickly.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Siara, we are delighted that our attorney Kelsey won a good outcome for you on your legal case and that you found her easy to work with in the process. Thank you for your vote of confidence!

reviews.text:
I hired David Lutz November of 2022, and I’m grateful for the hard work he and his paralegal Jill have put into my case.

My case was an adequate cause case which wasn’t a simple case. While we are still waiting for settlement and trial, I can confidently say that Mr. Lutz has listened to my concerns and advised me throughout this entire difficult and stressful process. Not only was I granted adequate cause, but also granted full custody with supervised visits for the other party.

Although my case isn’t complete yet, Mr. Lutz has been working with me and my financial situation so I can save up for trial. He is very responsive which I believe is vital for having representation. Although Jill no longer works there, Shawna another awesome paralegal has been responsive to emails I have sent.

Going through parenting plan changes can be VERY stressful. I am thankful that I chose this law firm to represent me and help me protect my daughter. For this alone- and the responsiveness of this law firm, I recommended to anyone seeking professional and knowledgeable representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and positive feedback, Christina!  Navigating through legal proceedings can be difficult and scary, and it warms our hearts to know our help has been valuable.  We are deeply appreciative of your willingness to share your experience with others!

reviews.text:
I am writing this review to express my deepest appreciation and heartfelt thanks for everything Mr. Schweinler and Ms. Connor did to assist my brother with his child support case. Your help and dedication to his case were invaluable, and we are so grateful for all that you did.

Your expertise and attention to detail were evident throughout the process, and your commitment to securing the best possible outcome for my brother. Your hard work and dedication have made a tremendous difference in our lives, and we will always be grateful for your kindness and generosity.

I cannot express our gratitude enough for all that you have done to help my brother in his time of need. Your professionalism, integrity, and compassion truly set you apart as a dedicated and skilled attorney. We could not have asked for better representation, and you have our deepest thanks and admiration.

Thank you again for everything you have done for my brother. Your help and support have made a real difference in his life and we will always remember your kindness and dedication.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is our firm's greatest pleasure to serve our clients well, thank you so much for the opportunity and the kind words.  Your positive outcome is what we desire and the affirmation is music to our ears!

reviews.text: They made things super easy. Thank you for all the hard work.

Andrew Voelker & Amy Desimone have been wonderful to work with. They are attentive and responsive. They have offered guidance on one DVPO case, helped obtain a Stalking protection order, and are also on retainer for my family law case. I can't thank them enough for the work they have put in over the last 7 months.  All other office staff I have spoken with VIA phone/email have been wonderful as well and very professional.

We are currently working with David Lutz, The paralegal, receptionist and legal help have all be extordinary.  They have a option of locations. We have been meeting at the Kent location.  Very impressed with the help we are receiving.
reviews.ownerResponse: We strive to meet our client's expectations and appreciate the opportunity to do so.

reviews.text: What a fantastic law firm. Professional, quick to respond, bottom line….will get the job done! Well recommended. Mr. Brian Murry, I cannot thank you enough. Great job Sir!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for letting others know about our level of service.

reviews.text:
I contacted Lutz Law about a parenting situation with my child's mother. Roger Schweinler heard my case, was very respectful, and very real about what I should expect in terms of outcomes.

Throughout the case Kyra Warner, Roger's paralegal, was very responsive in relaying information from Roger and about my case. This was very helpful because I did not have to question where the case was at during any given time.

In the end Roger came through on our initial discussion and got the plan I was looking for. Now I have time with my child that can't be snatched away at a moments notice due to how she is feeling that day.

I would highly reccomend Roger Schweinler and Kyra Warner for your legal needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: When it comes to our client's children, we know this is one of the most important things in their life and therefore use all our efforts to answer questions, keep everyone informed, and move the case to a successful outcome.

reviews.text: My girlfriend was dealing with her divorce and after spending lots if money with another attorney and getting no results We finally talked with Roger at Lutz and Associates and got the results we wanted. Which allowed her to keep her house to raise her kids in. Iam very thankful for all he did for her.
reviews.ownerResponse: With the experience our attorneys bring to you and your case, you do not have to throw your money away on law firms or attorneys who are not quite sure what to do.

reviews.text: I just want to say Thank You to Mr. Schweinler, Kyra and AshLeigh. Upon retaining Lutz and Assoc. for my relocation case. I was relieved with the knowledge and professionalism I was greeted with. Communication was wonderful, and preparedness for my case was outstanding. This was a life changing event for me and my family that they handled. We appreciate all this team has done!!
reviews.ownerResponse: This review and our client's satisfaction are what we set out to do from the beginning of the case. We place a high emphasis on communication. As a result many of our clients say for the first time they understand what is happening in their case.

Sara,

Thank you for the review!

reviews.text: Lutz and Associates’ Attorney Kelsey Morfitt has been my beacon of hope at a time when my options seemed limited. I thought the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution was impossible for my case until I retained Attorney Kelsey Morfitt. The Lutz and Associates staff are people-orientated and actually listen, which gives a great impression of trustworthiness. I am grateful to Attorney Kelsey and the Lutz Law Firm for their guidance thus far. I can’t wait till the day my case is finalized so that I’m able to provide a better life for my boys. Attorney Kelsey is extremely professional and dedicated to her clients, dealing with her has been a great pleasure! She is kind, patient, very thorough, and responds promptly to inquiries. She takes the time to explain the process so that we are aware of upcoming events. The level of professionalism and attention to detail given is top-notch. If you are looking for a good lawyer that communicates with you and does a superb job look no further.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Copeland,

Thank you for taking the time to leave such a sweet review about your experience with Ms. Morfitt and our firm!

reviews.text: Half the time I felt like they were working for my ex husband. I should have done more research and found a lawyer that cared. I had to actually contact other lawyers to tell my lawyer that medical debt is shared. They did the bare minimum.
reviews.ownerResponse: Debts incurred during the marriage and before separation are "community" debts. A judge decides what is fair and equitable when dividing these debts. This may mean they are not shared.

reviews.text: Lutz & Associates, P.S. has enough offices in the South Sound; they make it easy to find one that is convenient for you.  Their staff are friendly, professional, and knowledgeable in matters that concern your needs.  They are quick to respond to your emails and are constantly looking out for your best interests as their client, including reasonable fees.  I pray I never need to use them again, so I gladly suggest them for your divorce needs.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Cara,

Thank you for taking the time to write such a kind review!

reviews.text: My experience with Lutz & Associates was exceptional! Ms. Morfitt and the staff in the Fircrest office were quick to respond to my questions and needs. Always professional, Ms. Morfitt knows her law, is patient and worked diligently to obtain the best outcome for me. She made the horrible experince of divorce manageable. I cannot praise her and her staff enough!

reviews.text:
Worst experience with this law firm period!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Paid attorney to help represent me and my children. Attorney was not prepared for court or have any idea how to go about my court case. Spoke with multiple people before I was assigned to an actual lawyer. Lawyer lost case and felt was very uneducated about my case I general. Gladly took my money but did not fulfill the actual duties. Before attorney withdrew, I have/had multiple questions all within email and phone calls regarding my case and new problems occurring.

I have been given the run around for all locations and with all of them taking my info and them saving onto their screen so they can reach out to me and some even saying they’re not going to help me because if not there location.

It’s going on three months and still NO CONTACT. This is very important to me as it involves my children! Just wish the were as eager to actually HELP rather quick to take my money.
reviews.ownerResponse: As the founder and owner of this law firm, I commit to resolve every problem a client has with one of our attorneys or staff. I was unaware of this client's concern and will do everything I can to resolve their complaint.

reviews.text: Sarah and her assistant have been absolutely amazing. They always responded to me when I needed them to, kept me updated, and always assured me when I felt nervous about my case. I would definitely recommend them to someone if they are looking for a family law lawyer. Thank you Sarah!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brandi,
Thank you for taking the time to share about your experience with the Sarah and Heather, they really appreciated the feedback!
-Lutz & Associates, P.S.

reviews.text: I did all my own paralegal work myself, there were multiple errors and misspellings in my docs that were filed from the atty and para, including them misspelling the name of my husband we were serving. Bare minimum demands were documented, if my demands did not fit their boiler plate template, they didn’t know what to do. They bill and invoice on things like when you want to close your account and things show up in your statement of “reviewed case” when no work has been done for 6 weeks. I got assigned the absolute B team attorney and paralegal, the OP literally made fun of my counsel for being so unprepared and it hurt me in the end.
reviews.ownerResponse: There are times when we are unable to please our clients. We do not oversell what we can do. Sometimes what a client wants is not doable. Our firm does not have a "B" team. Our attorneys and staff are experienced, care, and work hard.

reviews.text:
Kelsey & Cassandra were a huge help throughout my entire divorce proceeding, both legally and emotionally/mentally. As a lawyer, Kelsey
was great. But as a person, she went above and beyond to help me. During a time like this, I was worried about a lawyer that actually cared for my problem and not for my money. Safe to say, everyone over at Lutz Law was very caring and helpful, putting me first instead of my money.

They were very patient with my trauma throughout this ordeal and were always willing to comfort me during my times of pain. Not only that, they helped me secure what I was looking for and then some. All in all, I can't recommend them enough. Thanks again Kelsey, Cassandra, and all of Lutz & Associates! God bless you all!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for the kind words, Un Hong! It was a pleasure working with you.
-Lutz & Associates, P.S.

reviews.text: Brian Murry is a great attorney. He is straight forward, responsive, provides realistic solutions, and advocates strongly for his clients. When you work with him, you know he always has your best interests in mind. I am very pleased I hired Mr. Murry and Tonya Fries, and I would recommend them to anyone I know going through a family law case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for joining many others who compliment our attorneys and staff.

reviews.text: This Law Firm absolutely was a blessing to my life they worked very hard and very professional I just recently Won!!! full custody case for my son... which is very difficult for me being a father in a different state but this team really work very hard paid attention to detail and now I have custody of my son. I highly recommend this law firm and I definitely would use them again thank you very much I am forever grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Our most difficult case is one representing a parenting who is very challenged "legally" in their case. Custody cases are complicated and require experience and a sharp legal mind. We are pleased to have been a "blessing" in our client's life.
Thank you!

reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience working with Lutz Law. Brian and Tonya were there every step of the way to help answer all of my questions in a professional and timely manner. Their attention to my case and situation was always noticeable and appreciated. Their high level of professionalism and attention to my case lead to a very positive outcome for my family. If you are in need of family law representation I highly recommend their service.
reviews.ownerResponse: We were and are very pleased to represent clients and help them achieve their legal goals. Accessibility, communications, and hard work bring better results and happier clients.

reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with this office, in Kent. I have had to call a few times and they have been so patient and so helpful. I couldn't imagine working with anyone else.
